AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates two IAM roles for EC2 instances with read-only access to IAM resources using the IAMReadOnlyAccess managed policy.'

Resources:
  EC2IAMReadOnlyRole1:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2IAMReadOnlyRole1'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/IAMReadOnlyAccess
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2IAMReadOnlyRole1'
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: EC2-IAM-ReadOnly-Access

  EC2IAMReadOnlyRole2:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2IAMReadOnlyRole2'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/IAMReadOnlyAccess
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2IAMReadOnlyRole2'
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: EC2-IAM-ReadOnly-Access

Outputs:
  EC2IAMReadOnlyRole1Arn:
    Description: 'ARN of the EC2 IAM Read-Only Role 1 for read-only access to IAM resources'
    Value: !GetAtt EC2IAMReadOnlyRole1.Arn

  EC2IAMReadOnlyRole2Arn:
    Description: 'ARN of the EC2 IAM Read-Only Role 2 for read-only access to IAM resources'
    Value: !GetAtt EC2IAMReadOnlyRole2.Arn
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-0868266d' on aws", 'iac-god-eval-0868266d: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - User Initiated', 'EC2IAMReadOnlyRole1: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'EC2IAMReadOnlyRole2: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'EC2IAMReadOnlyRole1: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - Resource creation Initiated', 'EC2IAMReadOnlyRole2: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - Resource creation Initiated', 'EC2IAMReadOnlyRole1: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'EC2IAMReadOnlyRole2: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-0868266d: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Parameters:
  MasterUsername:
    Type: String
    Default: 'admin'
  DBName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'mydatabase'
  AllocatedStorage:
    Type: Number
    Default: 100
Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'
  PrivateSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 0
        - !GetAZs ''
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnetA'
  PrivateSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 1
        - !GetAZs ''
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnetB'
  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRouteTable'
  PrivateSubnetARouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetA
  PrivateSubnetBRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetB
  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: !Sub 'Private DB Subnet Group for ${AWS::StackName}'
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnetA
        - !Ref PrivateSubnetB
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-dbsubnetgroup'
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
  RDSSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: !Sub 'Security group for ${AWS::StackName} RDS MySQL instance'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
          Description: 'Allow inbound MySQL (3306) from VPC CIDR'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-rds-sg'
  DBInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      Engine: mysql
      EngineVersion: '8.0.45'
      DBInstanceClass: db.r5.large
      AllocatedStorage: !Ref AllocatedStorage
      StorageType: io1
      Iops: 1000
      StorageEncrypted: true
      MasterUsername: !Ref MasterUsername
      ManageMasterUserPassword: true
      DBName: !Ref DBName
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref RDSSecurityGroup
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      MultiAZ: false
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      AutoMinorVersionUpgrade: true
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-db'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-db'
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
Outputs:
  RDSEndpointAddress:
    Description: 'RDS Instance Endpoint Address'
    Value: !GetAtt DBInstance.Endpoint.Address
  DBSubnetGroupName:
    Description: 'DB Subnet Group Name'
    Value: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
  VPCId:
    Description: 'VPC ID'
    Value: !Ref VPC
  RDSSecurityGroupId:
    Description: 'RDS Security Group ID'
    Value: !Ref RDSSecurityGroup

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: MySQL RDS instance with VPC and public subnets

Parameters:
  MasterUsername:
    Type: String
    Default: 'admin'
  DBName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'mydb'

Resources:
  MyVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.0.0/16'
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'

  IGW:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-igw'

  VPCGWAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref IGW

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      AvailabilityZone:
        Fn::Select:
          - 0
          - Fn::GetAZs:
              Ref: AWS::Region
      CidrBlock: '10.0.1.0/24'
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet-1'

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      AvailabilityZone:
        Fn::Select:
          - 1
          - Fn::GetAZs:
              Ref: AWS::Region
      CidrBlock: '10.0.2.0/24'
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet-2'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-rt'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: '0.0.0.0/0'
      GatewayId: !Ref IGW

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: !Sub '${AWS::StackName} DB Subnet Group'
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-dbsubnetgroup'

  RDSSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: !Sub '${AWS::StackName} RDS Security Group'
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          CidrIp: '0.0.0.0/0'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-rds-sg'

  DBInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Engine: mysql
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.micro
      MasterUsername: !Ref MasterUsername
      ManageMasterUserPassword: true
      DBName: !Ref DBName
      AllocatedStorage: 20
      StorageType: gp2
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref RDSSecurityGroup
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      StorageEncrypted: true
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-db'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-db'

Outputs:
  RDSEndpointAddress:
    Description: RDS Instance Endpoint Address
    Value: !GetAtt DBInstance.Endpoint.Address
  VPCId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref MyVPC

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Secure MySQL RDS deployment in isolated VPC with two private subnets, custom parameter group enforcing TLS, no inbound access, and Secrets Manager for admin credentials.

Parameters:
  VpcId:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    AllowedPattern: '^$|^vpc-[0-9a-f]{8,17}$'
    Description: 'Optional existing VPC ID (leave empty to create new VPC)'

Conditions:
  UseExistingVpc: !Not [!Equals [!Ref VpcId, '']]
  CreateNewVpc: !Equals [!Ref VpcId, '']

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Condition: CreateNewVpc
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !If [UseExistingVpc, !Ref VpcId, !Ref VPC]
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-subnet-1'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !If [UseExistingVpc, !Ref VpcId, !Ref VPC]
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-subnet-2'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !If [UseExistingVpc, !Ref VpcId, !Ref VPC]
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-routetable'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2

  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: !Sub 'DB Subnet Group for ${AWS::StackName}'
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-dbsubnetgroup'
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-dbsubnetgroup'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  RdsSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: !Sub 'Security group for RDS instance ${AWS::StackName} (no inbound)'
      VpcId: !If [UseExistingVpc, !Ref VpcId, !Ref VPC]
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-rds-sg'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  RdsParameterGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBParameterGroup
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub 'Custom MySQL 8.0 parameter group for ${AWS::StackName} enforcing TLS'
      Family: mysql8.0
      Parameters:
        require_secure_transport: "ON"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-rds-paramgroup'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  RdsInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      AllocatedStorage: 20
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.micro
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-db'
      DBParameterGroupName: !Ref RdsParameterGroup
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      Engine: mysql
      EngineVersion: '8.0.45'
      MasterUsername: admin
      MasterUserSecret:
        KmsKeyId: alias/aws/rds
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      StorageEncrypted: true
      StorageType: gp3
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref RdsSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-db'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

Outputs:
  RdsEndpoint:
    Description: RDS Instance Endpoint Address
    Value: !GetAtt RdsInstance.Endpoint.Address
  RdsSecretArn:
    Description: ARN of the Secrets Manager secret for RDS admin credentials
    Value: !GetAtt RdsInstance.MasterUserSecret.SecretArn
  VpcId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !If [UseExistingVpc, !Ref VpcId, !Ref VPC]
  PrivateSubnetIds:
    Description: Comma-separated IDs of private subnets
    Value: !Join [',', [!Ref PrivateSubnet1, !Ref PrivateSubnet2]]
  DBSubnetGroupName:
    Description: DB Subnet Group Name
    Value: !Ref DBSubnetGroup

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'deploys secure S3 buckets for replicas with access logging, SSE-S3 encryption, blocked public access, and HTTPS-only policies.'
Resources:
  ReplicaKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub 's3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-replicas-kms-key'
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: secure-replica-encryption
  ReplicaBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-replicas-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref ReplicaKMSKey
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      LoggingConfiguration:
        DestinationBucketName: !Ref AccessLogBucket
        LogFilePrefix: replica-logs/
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-replicas-bucket'
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: secure-replica-storage
  AccessLogBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-access-logs-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-accesslogs-bucket'
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: access-logging
  ReplicaBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref ReplicaBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub '${ReplicaBucket.Arn}/*'
              - !Sub '${ReplicaBucket.Arn}'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
  AccessLogBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref AccessLogBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: logging.s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
            Resource: !Sub '${AccessLogBucket.Arn}/replica-logs/${ReplicaBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                's3:x-amz-grant-full-control': true
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: logging.s3.amazonaws.com
            Action: s3:ListBucket
            Resource: !Sub '${AccessLogBucket.Arn}'
            Condition:
              StringLike:
                's3:prefix': !Sub 'replica-logs/${ReplicaBucket}*'
Outputs:
  ReplicaBucketName:
    Value: !Ref ReplicaBucket
  ReplicaBucketArn:
    Value: !GetAtt ReplicaBucket.Arn
  AccessLogBucketName:
    Value: !Ref AccessLogBucket
  AccessLogBucketArn:
    Value: !GetAtt AccessLogBucket.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for S3 bucket with Lambda trigger'

Resources:
  S3TriggerKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub 's3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
                'kms:CallerAccount': !Ref AWS::AccountId
              StringLike:
                'kms:EncryptionContext:aws:s3:arn': 'arn:aws:s3:::*/*'

  S3TriggerBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-s3-trigger-bucket-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref S3TriggerKMSKey
      NotificationConfiguration:
        LambdaConfigurations:
          - Function: !GetAtt S3TriggerLambdaFunction.Arn
            Event: s3:ObjectCreated:*

  S3TriggerBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3TriggerBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: ForceSSL
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3TriggerBucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3TriggerBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  S3TriggerLambdaRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole

  S3TriggerLambdaLogsPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-lambda-logs-policy'
      Roles:
        - !Ref S3TriggerLambdaRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - logs:CreateLogGroup
              - logs:CreateLogStream
              - logs:PutLogEvents
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/lambda/${AWS::StackName}-s3-trigger-lambda:*'

  S3TriggerLambdaFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-s3-trigger-lambda'
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt S3TriggerLambdaRole.Arn
      Timeout: 30
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          def handler(event, context):
              print(event)
              return {'statusCode': 200}

  S3TriggerLambdaInvokePermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !GetAtt S3TriggerLambdaFunction.Arn
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: s3.amazonaws.com
      SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${AWS::StackName}-s3-trigger-bucket-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: S3 Bucket Name
    Value: !Ref S3TriggerBucket
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: Lambda Function ARN
    Value: !GetAtt S3TriggerLambdaFunction.Arn
  BucketArn:
    Description: S3 Bucket ARN
    Value: !GetAtt S3TriggerBucket.Arn

Resources:
  SqsKmsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeySpec: SYMMETRIC_DEFAULT
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Allow root access
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: '*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow SQS service
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sqs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                kms:ViaService: !Sub 'sqs.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
                kms:EncryptionContext:aws:sqs:queue-name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-fifo-queue.fifo'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-sqs-kms-key'
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
  FifoQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-fifo-queue.fifo'
      FifoQueue: true
      ContentBasedDeduplication: true
      FifoThroughputLimit: perQueue
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SqsKmsKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-fifo-queue'
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

Outputs:
  QueueUrl:
    Description: 'URL of the SQS FIFO queue'
    Value: !Ref FifoQueue
  QueueArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the SQS FIFO queue'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates a VPC with three subnets (two public across two AZs, one private).'

Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    "us-east-1":
      AZ1: us-east-1a
      AZ2: us-east-1b

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  PublicSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !FindInMap
        - RegionMap
        - !Ref AWS::Region
        - AZ1
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetA'

  PublicSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !FindInMap
        - RegionMap
        - !Ref AWS::Region
        - AZ2
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetB'

  PrivateSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !FindInMap
        - RegionMap
        - !Ref AWS::Region
        - AZ1
      CidrBlock: 10.0.10.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnetA'

  IGW:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  GatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref IGW

  PublicRT:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRT'

  PublicDefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRT
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref IGW

  PublicSubnetARTAssoc:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRT

  PublicSubnetBRTAssoc:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetB
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRT

  PrivateRT:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRT'

  PrivateSubnetARTAssoc:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRT

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: ID of the VPC
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPCId'

  PublicSubnetAId:
    Description: ID of Public Subnet A
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnetA
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetAId'

  PublicSubnetBId:
    Description: ID of Public Subnet B
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnetB
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetBId'

  PrivateSubnetAId:
    Description: ID of Private Subnet A
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnetA

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'S3 Bucket with KMS Encryption, Lifecycle, and Security Best Practices'

Resources:
  S3EncryptionKey:
    Type: 'AWS::KMS::Key'
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Enabled: true
      Description: 'KMS key for S3 bucket encryption'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Enable IAM User Permissions'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow S3 service to use key'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 's3.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'kms:ViaService':
                  - !Sub 's3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
                'kms:EncryptionContext:aws:s3:arn':
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}-encrypted-bucket'
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Purpose'
          Value: 'EncryptedStorage'
        - Key: 'Environment'
          Value: 'Production'
        - Key: 'ManagedBy'
          Value: 'CloudFormation'

  BucketEncryptionKeyAlias:
    Type: 'AWS::KMS::Alias'
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub 'alias/${AWS::StackName}-s3-encryption-key'
      TargetKeyId: !Ref S3EncryptionKey

  EncryptedS3Bucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}-encrypted-bucket'
      OwnershipControls:
        Rules:
          - ObjectOwnership: 'BucketOwnerEnforced'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: 'aws:kms'
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref S3EncryptionKey
            BucketKeyEnabled: true
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: 'DefaultLifecycle'
            Status: 'Enabled'
            Transitions:
              - TransitionInDays: 30
                StorageClass: 'STANDARD_IA'
              - TransitionInDays: 90
                StorageClass: 'GLACIER_IR'
            ExpirationInDays: 365
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Purpose'
          Value: 'EncryptedStorage'
        - Key: 'Environment'
          Value: 'Production'
        - Key: 'ManagedBy'
          Value: 'CloudFormation'

  BucketPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::BucketPolicy'
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref EncryptedS3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Enforce HTTPS'
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            NotAction:
              - 's3:GetBucket*'
              - 's3:List*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${EncryptedS3Bucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${EncryptedS3Bucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

Outputs:
  EncryptedBucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the encrypted S3 bucket'
    Value: !Ref EncryptedS3Bucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BucketName'
  EncryptedBucketArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the encrypted S3 bucket'
    Value: !GetAtt EncryptedS3Bucket.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BucketArn'
  EncryptionKeyArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the KMS key'
    Value: !GetAtt S3EncryptionKey.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-KeyArn'
  BucketEncryptionKeyAliasName:
    Description: 'Name of the KMS key alias'
    Value: !Ref BucketEncryptionKeyAlias
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AliasName'
  BucketEncryptionKeyAliasTargetKeyId:
    Description: 'Target Key ID (ARN) of the KMS key alias'
    Value: !GetAtt S3EncryptionKey.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AliasTargetKeyId'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template that creates a secure S3 bucket with integrated AWS KMS encryption, lifecycle management, versioning, public access blocks, ownership controls, and organizational tags.'

Resources:
  KmsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key for S3 bucket encryption'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Allow root access'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow S3 service'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 's3.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - 'kms:Encrypt'
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:ReEncrypt*'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
              - 'kms:DescribeKey'
            Resource: '*'

  KmsAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: 'alias/my-s3-encryption-key'
      TargetKeyId: !Ref KmsKey

  MyBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-encbkt-${AWS::StackName}'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      OwnershipControls:
        Rules:
          - ObjectOwnership: BucketOwnerEnforced
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !GetAtt KmsKey.Arn
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Status: Enabled
            Transitions:
              - StorageClass: STANDARD_IA
                TransitionInDays: 30
              - StorageClass: GLACIER
                TransitionInDays: 90
            ExpirationInDays: 365
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Name'
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Bucket'
        - Key: 'Environment'
          Value: 'Production'
        - Key: 'Purpose'
          Value: 'EncryptedStorage'

Description: 'VPC with managed NAT Gateway setup for four subnets (2 public, 2 private).'

Resources:

    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

      Tags:

          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-igw'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetA:

    Properties:

        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

    Properties:

      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-${AWS::Region}${!Select [1, !GetAZs ""]}-subnet'
        - Key: Tier
          Value: public
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: ManagedBy

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream with S3 destination, server-side encryption using AWS managed keys, and destination error logging to CloudWatch Logs.

Resources:
  S3EncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-S3EncryptionKey'
      KeyPolicy: !Sub |
        {
          "Version": "2012-10-17",
          "Statement": [
            {
              "Sid": "Allow root",
              "Effect": "Allow",
              "Principal": {
                "AWS": "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
              },
              "Action": "kms:*",
              "Resource": "*"
            },
            {
              "Sid": "Allow S3",
              "Effect": "Allow",
              "Principal": {
                "Service": "s3.amazonaws.com"
              },
              "Action": [
                "kms:GenerateDataKey*",
                "kms:Decrypt"
              ],
              "Resource": "*"
            }
          ]
        }
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain

  Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::StackName}-firehose-bucket-${AWS::Region}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref S3EncryptionKey
      OwnershipControls:
        Rules:
          - ObjectOwnership: BucketOwnerEnforced
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain

  BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyUnsecureCommunications
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt Bucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${Bucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              BoolIfExists:
                aws:SecureTransport: false
          - Sid: AllowFirehoseServiceRole
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !GetAtt FirehoseRole.Arn
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject*
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
              - s3:AbortMultipartUpload*
              - s3:ListBucket*
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt Bucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${Bucket.Arn}/*'

  FirehoseRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-FirehoseRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: firehose.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-FirehoseS3Policy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject*
                  - s3:PutObjectAcl
                  - s3:AbortMultipartUpload*
                  - s3:ListBucket*
                  - s3:GetObject*
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt Bucket.Arn
                  - !Sub '${Bucket.Arn}/*'

  ErrorLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub '/aws/kinesis/${AWS::StackName}-firehose-errors'
      RetentionInDays: 14
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain

  ErrorLogStream:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogStream
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Ref ErrorLogGroup
      LogStreamName: delivery-errors

  LogsResourcePolicy:
    Type: AWS::Logs::ResourcePolicy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-FirehoseLogsPolicy'
      PolicyDocument: !Sub |
        {
          "Version": "2012-10-17",
          "Statement": [
            {
              "Effect": "Allow",
              "Principal": {
                "Service": "firehose.amazonaws.com"
              },
              "Action": [
                "logs:PutLogEvents",
                "logs:CreateLogStream"
              ],
              "Resource": "arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:${ErrorLogGroup}:*"
            }
          ]
        }

  FirehoseStream:
    Type: AWS::KinesisFirehose::DeliveryStream
    Properties:
      DeliveryStreamName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-firehose-stream'
      DeliveryStreamType: DirectPut
      DeliveryStreamEncryptionConfigurationInput:
        KeyType: AWS_OWNED_CMK
      S3DestinationConfiguration:
        RoleARN: !GetAtt FirehoseRole.Arn
        BucketARN: !GetAtt Bucket.Arn
        BufferingHints:
          SizeInMBs: 5
          IntervalInSeconds: 300
        CompressionFormat: GZIP
        CloudWatchLoggingOptions:
          Enabled: true
          LogGroupName: !Ref ErrorLogGroup
          LogStreamName: !Ref ErrorLogStream

Outputs:
  DeliveryStreamArn:
    Description: ARN of the Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream
    Value: !GetAtt FirehoseStream.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DeliveryStreamArn'

  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket used as Firehose destination
    Value: !Ref Bucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BucketName'

  LogGroupName:
    Description: Name of the CloudWatch Log Group for Firehose error logging
    Value: !Ref ErrorLogGroup
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LogGroupName'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Deploys a resilient Jenkins CI/CD server on EC2 within a VPC, with static EIP, SSM access, CloudWatch auto-recovery on system status check failures, and production best practices.'

Resources:
  JenkinsVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Jenkins-VPC'

  JenkinsIGW:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Jenkins-IGW'

  JenkinsIGWAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref JenkinsVPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref JenkinsIGW

  JenkinsPublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref JenkinsVPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 0
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Jenkins-PublicSubnet'

  JenkinsPublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref JenkinsVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Jenkins-PublicRouteTable'

  JenkinsPublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref JenkinsPublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref JenkinsIGW

  JenkinsPublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref JenkinsPublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref JenkinsPublicRouteTable

  JenkinsSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'Security group for Jenkins server: HTTP (80), ICMP, all outbound.'
      VpcId: !Ref JenkinsVPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: icmp
          FromPort: -1
          ToPort: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-JenkinsSecurityGroup'

  JenkinsEC2Role:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-JenkinsEC2Role'

  JenkinsInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref JenkinsEC2Role

  JenkinsLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    DependsOn: JenkinsInstanceProfile
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/al2023-ami-kernel-default-x86_64:1}}'
        InstanceType: t3.micro
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Arn: !GetAtt JenkinsInstanceProfile.Arn
        BlockDeviceMappings:
          - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
            Ebs:
              VolumeType: gp3
              VolumeSize: 30
              DeleteOnTermination: false
              Encrypted: true
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpTokens: required
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
          HttpPutResponseHopLimit: 1
          InstanceMetadataTags: disabled
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64: !Sub |
            #!/bin/bash
            dnf update -y
            dnf install -y java-11-amazon-corretto
            wget -O /etc/yum.repos.d/jenkins.repo https://pkg.jenkins.io/redhat-stable/jenkins.repo
            rpm --import https://pkg.jenkins.io/redhat-stable/jenkins.io-2023.key
            dnf install -y jenkins
            echo 'JENKINS_PORT="80"' >> /etc/sysconfig/jenkins
            systemctl enable amazon-ssm-agent
            systemctl start amazon-ssm-agent
            systemctl daemon-reload
            systemctl enable jenkins
            systemctl start jenkins
            until curl -f http://localhost:80/ > /dev/null 2>&1; do
              echo "Waiting for Jenkins to start..."
              sleep 10
            done
            /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 0 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource JenkinsServer --region ${AWS::Region}
      TagSpecifications:
        - ResourceType: launch-template
          Tags:
            - Key: Name
              Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-JenkinsLaunchTemplate'

  JenkinsEIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Jenkins-EIP'

  JenkinsServer:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT20M
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref JenkinsLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt JenkinsLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      SubnetId: !Ref JenkinsPublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref JenkinsSecurityGroup
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeType: gp3
            VolumeSize: 30
            DeleteOnTermination: false
            Encrypted: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: JenkinsServer

  JenkinsEIPAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIPAssociation
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt JenkinsEIP.AllocationId
      InstanceId: !Ref JenkinsServer

  JenkinsSystemStatusCheckFailure:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-JenkinsSystemStatusCheckFailure'
      AlarmDescription: 'Triggers EC2 instance recovery when system status check fails for 2 consecutive periods.'
      ActionsEnabled: true
      AlarmActions:
        - !Sub 'arn:aws:ec2:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:action/Recover'
      Dimensions:
        - Name: InstanceId
          Value: !Ref JenkinsServer
      MetricName: StatusCheckFailed_System
      Namespace: AWS/EC2
      Statistic: Maximum
      Period: 60
      EvaluationPeriods: 2
      DatapointsToAlarm: 2
      Threshold: 1.0
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching

Outputs:
  JenkinsURL:
    Description: 'Jenkins Web UI URL (HTTP on port 80)'
    Value: !Sub 'http://${JenkinsEIP.PublicIp}'
  EC2InstanceId:
    Description: 'EC2 Instance ID for SSM Session Manager access (aws ssm start-session --target <InstanceId>)'
    Value: !Ref JenkinsServer
  EIPAddress:
    Description: 'Static Elastic IP address of the Jenkins server'
    Value: !GetAtt JenkinsEIP.PublicIp

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'This template provisions EC2-compatible IAM roles for IAM read-only access.'

Resources:
  EC2IAMReadOnlyRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2IAMReadOnlyRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/IAMReadOnlyAccess

  EC2IAMReadOnlyInstanceProfile:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile'
    Properties:
      InstanceProfileName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2IAMReadOnlyInstanceProfile'
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2IAMReadOnlyRole

Outputs:
  RoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the IAM role
    Value: !GetAtt EC2IAMReadOnlyRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RoleArn'
  InstanceProfileArn:
    Description: ARN of the IAM instance profile
    Value: !Ref EC2IAMReadOnlyInstanceProfile
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InstanceProfileArn'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: AWS Glue ETL Job Infrastructure

Resources:
  GlueBucketKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key for Glue scripts/logs bucket encryption'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  GlueScriptsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-glue-scripts-logs-${AWS::StackName}'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref GlueBucketKey
            BucketKeyEnabled: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  GlueExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: GlueExecutionRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: glue.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSGlueServiceRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  GlueS3AccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-glue-s3-access'
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:PutObject*
              - s3:DeleteObject
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${GlueScriptsBucket}/gue_scripts/*'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${GlueScriptsBucket}/logs/*'
      Roles:
        - !Ref GlueExecutionRole

  GlueETLJob:
    Type: AWS::Glue::Job
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-etl-job'
      GlueVersion: '4.0'
      Role: !GetAtt GlueExecutionRole.Arn
      Command:
        Name: glueetl
        ScriptLocation: !Sub 's3://${GlueScriptsBucket}/gue_scripts/sample_convert.py'
        PythonVersion: '3.9'
      WorkerType: G.1X
      NumberOfWorkers: 10
      Timeout: 2880
      MaxRetries: 0
      DefaultArguments:
        '--enable-continuous-cloudwatch-log': ''
        '--enable-metrics': ''
        '--enable-job-insights': ''
        '--job-bookmark-option': job-bookmark-enable
      Tags:
        Stack: !Ref AWS::StackName

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Value: !Ref GlueScriptsBucket
  GlueJobName:
    Value: !Ref GlueETLJob
  GlueExecutionRoleArn:
    Value: !GetAtt GlueExecutionRole.Arn
  GlueBucketKeyArn:
    Value: !GetAtt GlueBucketKey.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: This template deploys a Fargate-ready ECS cluster with networking.

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InternetGateway'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 0
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: !Select
        - 1
        - !Cidr
          - 10.0.0.0/16
          - 5
          - 8
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet1'

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 1
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: !Select
        - 2
        - !Cidr
          - 10.0.0.0/16
          - 5
          - 8
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet2'

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 0
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: !Select
        - 3
        - !Cidr
          - 10.0.0.0/16
          - 5
          - 8
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet1'

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 1
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: !Select
        - 4
        - !Cidr
          - 10.0.0.0/16
          - 5
          - 8
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet2'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2

  NatEIP1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NatEIP1'

  NatEIP2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NatEIP2'

  NatGateway1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NatEIP1.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NatGateway1'

  NatGateway2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NatEIP2.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NatGateway2'

  PrivateRouteTable1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRouteTable1'

  PrivateRoute1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable1
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway1

  PrivateRouteTable2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRouteTable2'

  PrivateRoute2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable2
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway2

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable1
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable2
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2

  FargateTaskSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Fargate tasks allowing all outbound traffic
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-FargateTaskSecurityGroup'

  ECSCluster:
    Type: AWS::ECS::Cluster
    Properties:
      ClusterName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Cluster'
      ClusterSettings:
        - Name: containerInsights
          Value: enabled
      Configuration:
        ExecuteCommandConfiguration:
          Logging: DEFAULT

Outputs:
  ClusterArn:
    Value: !GetAtt ECSCluster.Arn
  ClusterName:
    Value: !Ref ECSCluster
  VpcId:
    Value: !Ref VPC
  PublicSubnetIds:
    Value: !Join
      - ', '
      - - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
  PrivateSubnetIds:
    Value: !Join
      - ', '
      - - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
  FargateTaskSecurityGroupId:
    Value: !Ref FargateTaskSecurityGroup

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'EMR Serverless environment with private S3 storage for scripts/data and cost-optimized Spark application (emr-6.15.0) featuring auto-start/auto-stop.'

Resources:
  ExecutionRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-execution-role'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: emr-serverless.amazonaws.com
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EMRServerlessPolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 's3:GetObject'
                  - 's3:PutObject'
                  - 's3:DeleteObject'
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${DataBucket}/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 's3:ListBucket'
                  - 's3:GetBucketLocation'
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${DataBucket}'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'kms:DescribeKey'
                  - 'kms:Decrypt'
                  - 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
                Resource: !GetAtt EncryptionKey.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'logs:CreateLogGroup'
                  - 'logs:CreateLogStream'
                  - 'logs:PutLogEvents'
                  - 'logs:DescribeLogStreams'
                  - 'logs:DescribeLogGroups'
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/emr-serverless/*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  EncryptionKey:
    Type: 'AWS::KMS::Key'
    Properties:
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Allow root access'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  DataBucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketNamespace: account-regional
      BucketNamePrefix: !Sub 'emrsl-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref EncryptionKey
            BucketKeyEnabled: true
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  BucketPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::BucketPolicy'
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref DataBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${DataBucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${DataBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  SparkApp:
    Type: 'AWS::EMRServerless::Application'
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-spark-app'
      ReleaseLabel: emr-6.15.0
      Type: SPARK
      AutoStartConfiguration:
        Enabled: true
      AutoStopConfiguration:
        Enabled: true
        IdleTimeoutMinutes: 5
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

Outputs:
  S3BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket for EMR Serverless scripts and data
    Value: !Ref DataBucket
  ApplicationArn:
    Description: ARN of the EMR Serverless Spark application
    Value: !GetAtt SparkApp.Arn
  ExecutionRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the IAM execution role for EMR Serverless jobs
    Value: !Ref ExecutionRole
  EncryptionKeyArn:
    Description: ARN of KMS key for S3 encryption
    Value: !GetAtt EncryptionKey.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates a VPC with CIDR 10.0.0.0/16 enabling DNS hostnames and resolution, and a Security Group with no inbound rules and outbound all traffic.'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'

  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for VPC resources
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-sg'

Outputs:

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Secure Amazon Cognito User Pool with administrator-controlled provisioning and email-based authentication for centralized user management.'

Resources:
  SmsRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-CognitoSmsRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: cognito-idp.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'sts:ExternalId': !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-sms-role'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: CognitoSNSPublish
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sns:Publish
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'

  UserPool:
    Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPool
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      UserPoolName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-UserPool-${AWS::Region}'
      UsernameConfiguration:
        CaseSensitive: false
      UsernameAttributes:
        - email
      AutoVerifiedAttributes:
        - email
        - phone_number
      AdminCreateUserConfig:
        AllowAdminCreateUserOnly: true
      Policies:
        PasswordPolicy:
          MinimumLength: 8
          RequireUppercase: true
          RequireLowercase: true
          RequireNumbers: true
          RequireSymbols: true
          TemporaryPasswordValidityDays: 7
      MfaConfiguration: 'OPTIONAL'
      SmsConfiguration:
        ExternalId: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-sms-role'
        SnsCallerArn: !GetAtt SmsRole.Arn
      Schema:
        -
          Name: email
          AttributeDataType: String
          Mutable: false
          Required: true
        -
          Name: given_name
          AttributeDataType: String
          Mutable: true
          Required: true
        -
          Name: family_name
          AttributeDataType: String
          Mutable: true
          Required: true
        -
          Name: preferred_username
          AttributeDataType: String
          Mutable: true
          Required: true
        -
          Name: custom:department
          AttributeDataType: String
          Mutable: true
        -
          Name: phone_number
          AttributeDataType: String
          Mutable: true
          Required: false
      VerificationMessageTemplate:
        EmailSubject: !Sub 'Your ${AWS::StackName} verification code'
        EmailMessage: |
          Thank you for signing up.
          Your verification code is {####}.
          This code will expire in 24 hours.
      UserPoolTags:
        ManagedBy: CloudFormation
        Stack: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'

  AppClient:
    Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPoolClient
    Properties:
      UserPoolId: !Ref UserPool
      ClientName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AppClient'
      GenerateSecret: true
      AllowedOAuthFlows:
        - code
      AllowedOAuthFlowsUserPoolClient: true
      AllowedOAuthScopes:
        - email
        - openid
        - profile
        - phone
      CallbackURLs:
        - https://localhost:3000/callback
      LogoutURLs:
        - https://localhost:3000/
      ReadAttributes:
        - given_name
        - family_name
        - phone_number

Outputs:
  UserPoolId:
    Description: Cognito User Pool ID
    Value: !Ref UserPool
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-UserPoolId'

  UserPoolArn:
    Description: Cognito User Pool ARN
    Value: !GetAtt UserPool.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-UserPoolArn'

  AppClientId:
    Description: Cognito User Pool App Client ID
    Value: !Ref AppClient
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AppClientId'

  AppClientSecret:
    Description: Cognito User Pool App Client Secret
    Value: !GetAtt AppClient.ClientSecret
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AppClientSecret'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "Basic Amazon ECS cluster with configurable Container Insights and CloudWatch alarms for CPU/Memory reservation monitoring"

Parameters:
  EnableContainerInsights:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues: ["enabled", "disabled"]
    Default: "enabled"
  EnableAlarms:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues: ["true", "false"]
    Default: "true"
  CpuReservationThreshold:
    Type: Number
    Default: 80
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 100
  MemoryReservationThreshold:
    Type: Number
    Default: 80
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 100
  AlarmEvaluationPeriods:
    Type: Number
    Default: 2
    MinValue: 1
  AlarmPeriodSeconds:
    Type: Number
    Default: 300
    MinValue: 60
  SnsTopicArn:
    Type: String
    Default: ""
    AllowedPattern: "^$|^arn:aws:sns:.*"

Conditions:
  ContainerInsightsEnabled: !Equals [!Ref EnableContainerInsights, "enabled"]
  AlarmsEnabled: !Equals [!Ref EnableAlarms, "true"]
  SnsTopicProvided: !Not [!Equals [!Ref SnsTopicArn, ""]]

Resources:
  ECSCluster:
    Type: AWS::ECS::Cluster
    Properties:
      ClusterName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-cluster"
      ClusterSettings: !If [ContainerInsightsEnabled, [{Name: "containerInsights", Value: "enabled"}], []]
      Tags:
        - Key: "Name"
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-cluster"
        - Key: "Environment"
          Value: "Production"

  CpuReservationHighAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Condition: AlarmsEnabled
    Properties:
      Namespace: "AWS/ECS"
      MetricName: "CPUReservation"
      Dimensions:
        - Name: "ClusterName"
          Value: !Ref ECSCluster
      Statistic: "Maximum"
      Period: !Ref AlarmPeriodSeconds
      EvaluationPeriods: !Ref AlarmEvaluationPeriods
      Threshold: !Ref CpuReservationThreshold
      ComparisonOperator: "GreaterThanThreshold"
      AlarmDescription: "Alarm when CPU reservation exceeds threshold"
      AlarmActions:
        - !If [SnsTopicProvided, !Ref SnsTopicArn, !Ref AWS::NoValue]

  MemoryReservationHighAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Condition: AlarmsEnabled
    Properties:
      Namespace: "AWS/ECS"
      MetricName: "MemoryReservation"
      Dimensions:
        - Name: "ClusterName"
          Value: !Ref ECSCluster
      Statistic: "Maximum"
      Period: !Ref AlarmPeriodSeconds
      EvaluationPeriods: !Ref AlarmEvaluationPeriods
      Threshold: !Ref MemoryReservationThreshold
      ComparisonOperator: "GreaterThanThreshold"
      AlarmDescription: "Alarm when memory reservation exceeds threshold"
      AlarmActions:
        - !If [SnsTopicProvided, !Ref SnsTopicArn, !Ref AWS::NoValue]

Outputs:
  ClusterName:
    Description: "Name of the ECS cluster"
    Value: !Ref ECSCluster
  ClusterArn:
    Description: "ARN of the ECS cluster for service/task definitions"
    Value: !GetAtt ECSCluster.Arn
  MonitoringEnabled:
    Description: "Status of Container Insights"
    Value: !Ref EnableContainerInsights

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template that creates an Amazon Kinesis Data Stream for real-time data ingestion and processing with CloudWatch alarms alerting on read and write throughput exceeding 10MB over 15 minutes via SNS notifications.'

Resources:
  KinesisStream:
    Type: 'AWS::Kinesis::Stream'
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DataStream'
      RetentionPeriodHours: 168
      StreamModeDetails:
        StreamMode: ON_DEMAND
      StreamEncryption:
        EncryptionType: KMS
        KeyId: 'alias/aws/kinesis'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  SNSTopicKey:
    Type: 'AWS::KMS::Key'
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub 'KMS key for ${AWS::StackName} SNS topic encryption'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnableIAMUserPermissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowSNSPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 'sns.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  ThroughputAlertsTopic:
    Type: 'AWS::SNS::Topic'
    Properties:
      DisplayName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName} Throughput Alerts'
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SNSTopicKey

  ThroughputAlertsTopicPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy'
    Properties:
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowCloudWatchToPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: cloudwatch.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !GetAtt ThroughputAlertsTopic.TopicArn
      Topics:
        - !Ref ThroughputAlertsTopic

  HighWriteThroughputAlarm:
    Type: 'AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm'
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-HighWriteThroughputAlarm'
      AlarmDescription: 'Alert when Kinesis IncomingBytes exceeds 10MB (10485760 bytes) threshold'
      ActionsEnabled: true
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref ThroughputAlertsTopic
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching
      EvaluationPeriods: 3
      DatapointsToAlarm: 2
      Threshold: 10485760.0
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      Period: 300
      Statistic: Sum
      MetricName: IncomingBytes
      Namespace: AWS/Kinesis
      Dimensions:
        - Name: StreamName
          Value: !Ref KinesisStream

  HighReadThroughputAlarm:
    Type: 'AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm'
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-HighReadThroughputAlarm'
      AlarmDescription: 'Alert when Kinesis OutgoingBytes exceeds 10MB (10485760 bytes) threshold'
      ActionsEnabled: true
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref ThroughputAlertsTopic
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching
      EvaluationPeriods: 3
      DatapointsToAlarm: 2
      Threshold: 10485760.0
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      Period: 300
      Statistic: Sum
      MetricName: OutgoingBytes
      Namespace: AWS/Kinesis
      Dimensions:
        - Name: StreamName
          Value: !Ref KinesisStream

Outputs:
  KinesisStreamArn:
    Description: ARN of the Kinesis Data Stream
    Value: !GetAtt KinesisStream.Arn
  KinesisStreamName:
    Description: Name of the Kinesis Data Stream
    Value: !Ref KinesisStream
  KinesisEndpoint:
    Description: HTTPS endpoint for the Kinesis Data Stream
    Value: !Sub 'https://kinesis.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
  HighWriteThroughputAlarmArn:
    Description: ARN of the high write throughput alarm
    Value: !Ref HighWriteThroughputAlarm
  HighReadThroughputAlarmArn:

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for centralized KMS encryption key'

Resources:
  CentralEncryptionKey:
    Type: 'AWS::KMS::Key'
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key for centralized encryption management'
      KeySpec: SYMMETRIC_DEFAULT
      KeyUsage: ENCRYPT_DECRYPT
      Enabled: true
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy: !Sub |
        {
          "Version": "2012-10-17",
          "Statement": [
            {
              "Sid": "Enable root full access",
              "Effect": "Allow",
              "Principal": { "AWS": "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root" },
              "Action": "kms:*",
              "Resource": "*"
            },
            {
              "Sid": "Allow account use",
              "Effect": "Allow",
              "Principal": "*",
              "Action": [
                "kms:Encrypt",
                "kms:Decrypt",
                "kms:ReEncrypt*",
                "kms:GenerateDataKey*",
                "kms:DescribeKey"
              ],
              "Resource": "*",
              "Condition": {
                "StringEquals": {
                  "aws:PrincipalAccount": "${AWS::AccountId}"
                }
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Key'
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-central-encryption-key'
        - Key: 'Purpose'
          Value: 'Centralized encryption management'
  CentralEncryptionAlias:
    Type: 'AWS::KMS::Alias'
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub 'alias/${AWS::StackName}-central-encryption'
      TargetKeyId: !Ref CentralEncryptionKey

Outputs:
  CentralEncryptionKeyArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the central encryption KMS key'
    Value: !GetAtt CentralEncryptionKey.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-CentralEncryptionKeyArn'
  CentralEncryptionAliasArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the central encryption KMS key alias'
    Value: !Sub 'arn:aws:kms:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${CentralEncryptionAlias}'
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-CentralEncryptionAliasArn'

Description: Private VPC with Route53 Private Hosted Zone for example.com

Resources:

    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC

      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-vpc"
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: "PrivateRoute53HostedZone"

    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet

      VpcId: !Ref VPC

          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnetA"
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: "PrivateRoute53HostedZone"

    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']

        - Key: Name

        - Key: Purpose

      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRouteTable"
        - Key: Purpose

  PrivateRouteTableAssociationA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation

      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetA

      PortRange:

      Protocol: -1
      RuleAction: deny

    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535
      Egress: true

  OutboundUdpEphemeral:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 110
      Protocol: 17
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535
      Egress: true

  OutboundDenyAll:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 32766
      Protocol: -1
      RuleAction: deny
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      Egress: true

  SubnetNaclAssociationA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetA
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl

  SubnetNaclAssociationB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetB
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl

  HostedZone:
    Type: AWS::Route53::HostedZone
    Properties:
      Name: "example.com."
      HostedZoneConfig: {}
      VPCs:
        - VPCId: !Ref VPC
          VPCRegion: !Ref 'AWS::Region'
      HostedZoneTags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PrivateHostedZone"
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: "PrivateRoute53HostedZone"

Outputs:
  HostedZoneId:
    Description: ID of the private Route53 Hosted Zone
    Value: !Ref HostedZone
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-HostedZoneId"

  VPCId:
    Description: ID of the private VPC
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-VPCId"
