AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Deploys a multi-AZ public Aurora MySQL cluster with two db.t3.large instances across two public subnets, CloudWatch error log exports enabled, and necessary VPC networking.'

Parameters:
  MasterUsername:
    Type: String
    Default: 'admin'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.0.0/16'
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: '10.0.1.0/24'
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet1'

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: '10.0.2.0/24'
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet2'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'

  PublicInternetRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: '0.0.0.0/0'
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  RDSSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'Allow inbound MySQL/Aurora traffic on port 3306 from anywhere and all outbound traffic'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          CidrIp: '0.0.0.0/0'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RDSSG'

  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: 'Public subnets for Aurora cluster'
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Public-DBSubnetGroup'
        - Key: NetworkLocation
          Value: Public

  AuroraKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-aurora-key'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Allow admin'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow RDS'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 'rds.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
      EnableKeyRotation: true

  AuroraKMSKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub 'alias/${AWS::StackName}-aurora-key'
      TargetKeyId: !Ref AuroraKMSKey

  AuroraWriterCluster:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBCluster
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Engine: 'aurora-mysql'
      MasterUsername: !Ref MasterUsername
      ManageMasterUserPassword: true
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      VpcSecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref RDSSecurityGroup
      StorageEncrypted: true
      KmsKeyId: !Ref AuroraKMSKey
      DeletionProtection: true
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      PreferredBackupWindow: '03:00-04:00'
      PreferredMaintenanceWindow: 'Sun:05:00-Sun:06:00'
      EnableCloudwatchLogsExports:
        - error
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-cluster'

  AuroraWriterInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-writer'
      DBInstanceClass: 'db.t3.large'
      Engine: 'aurora-mysql'
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Ref AuroraWriterCluster
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']

  AuroraReaderInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-reader'
      DBInstanceClass: 'db.t3.large'
      Engine: 'aurora-mysql'
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Ref AuroraWriterCluster
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']

Outputs:
  ClusterEndpoint:
    Description: 'Aurora cluster writer endpoint address'
    Value: !GetAtt AuroraWriterCluster.Endpoint.Address
  ReaderEndpoint:
    Description: 'Aurora cluster reader endpoint address'
    Value: !GetAtt AuroraWriterCluster.ReadEndpoint.Address
  MasterUserSecret:
    Description: 'Secret ARN for master user password'
    Value: !GetAtt AuroraWriterCluster.MasterUserSecret.SecretArn
  WriterInstanceIdentifier:
    Description: 'Writer DB instance identifier'
    Value: !Ref AuroraWriterInstance
  ReaderInstanceIdentifier:
    Description: 'Reader DB instance identifier'
    Value: !Ref AuroraReaderInstance

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'deploys a simple Node.js 22.x Lambda function that prints "hello world"'

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole

  HelloWorldFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-hello-world-function'
      Runtime: nodejs22.x
      Handler: index.handler
      Timeout: 3
      MemorySize: 128
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          exports.handler = async (event) => {
            console.log('hello world');
            return {
              statusCode: 200,
              body: JSON.stringify('hello world')
            };
          };

Outputs:
  HelloWorldFunctionArn:
    Description: ARN of the Hello World Lambda function
    Value: !GetAtt HelloWorldFunction.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-HelloWorldFunctionArn'
  HelloWorldFunctionName:
    Description: Name of the Hello World Lambda function
    Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-hello-world-function'
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-HelloWorldFunctionName'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates a VPC with a public subnet and internet routing for demo environments.'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: 'VPC ID for easy reference in demos like EC2 auto-scaling alarms.'
    Value: !Ref VPC
  PublicSubnetId:
    Description: 'Public Subnet ID for easy reference in demos like EC2 auto-scaling alarms.'
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet
  InternetGatewayId:
    Description: 'Internet Gateway ID for easy reference in demos like EC2 auto-scaling alarms.'
    Value: !Ref InternetGateway

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Shared S3 Bucket accessible to Single Account, Organization, or Organizational Unit'

Parameters:
  AccessType:
    Type: String
    Default: 'SingleAccount'
    AllowedValues:
      - 'SingleAccount'
      - 'Organization'
      - 'OrganizationalUnit'
    Description: 'SingleAccount uses current AWS account, Organization requires PrincipalIdentifier as Org ID (o-xxxx), OrganizationalUnit requires PrincipalIdentifier as full OU path (o-xxxx/ou-yyyy/*).'
  PrincipalIdentifier:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    AllowedPattern: '^$|^o-[a-z0-9]{4,32}(/ou-[a-z0-9]{4,32})*\\*?$'
    Description: 'Format for Organization (o-xxxx) or OrganizationalUnit (o-xxxx/ou-yyyy/*). Leave empty for SingleAccount.'

Conditions:
  UseSingleAccount: !Equals
    - !Ref AccessType
    - 'SingleAccount'
  UseOrganization: !Equals
    - !Ref AccessType
    - 'Organization'

Resources:
  Bucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-shared-bucket-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Name'
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
      OwnershipControls:
        Rules:
          - ObjectOwnership: 'BucketOwnerEnforced'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: 'Enabled'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: 'aws:kms'
              KMSMasterKeyID: 'alias/aws/s3'

  BucketPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::BucketPolicy'
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          Fn::If:
            - UseSingleAccount
            -
              - Effect: 'Deny'
                Principal: '*'
                Action: 's3:*'
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt Bucket.Arn
                  - !Sub '${Bucket.Arn}/*'
                Condition:
                  Bool:
                    'aws:SecureTransport': false
              - Effect: 'Allow'
                Principal: '*'
                Action: 's3:ListBucket'
                Resource: !GetAtt Bucket.Arn
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    'aws:PrincipalAccount': !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
              - Effect: 'Allow'
                Principal: '*'
                Action:
                  - 's3:GetObject'
                  - 's3:PutObject'
                Resource: !Sub '${Bucket.Arn}/*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    'aws:PrincipalAccount': !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
            - Fn::If:
                - UseOrganization
                -
                  - Effect: 'Deny'
                    Principal: '*'
                    Action: 's3:*'
                    Resource:
                      - !GetAtt Bucket.Arn
                      - !Sub '${Bucket.Arn}/*'
                    Condition:
                      Bool:
                        'aws:SecureTransport': false
                  - Effect: 'Allow'
                    Principal: '*'
                    Action: 's3:ListBucket'
                    Resource: !GetAtt Bucket.Arn
                    Condition:
                      StringEquals:
                        'aws:PrincipalOrgID': !Ref PrincipalIdentifier
                  - Effect: 'Allow'
                    Principal: '*'
                    Action:
                      - 's3:GetObject'
                      - 's3:PutObject'
                    Resource: !Sub '${Bucket.Arn}/*'
                    Condition:
                      StringEquals:
                        'aws:PrincipalOrgID': !Ref PrincipalIdentifier
                -
                  - Effect: 'Deny'
                    Principal: '*'
                    Action: 's3:*'
                    Resource:
                      - !GetAtt Bucket.Arn
                      - !Sub '${Bucket.Arn}/*'
                    Condition:
                      Bool:
                        'aws:SecureTransport': false
                  - Effect: 'Allow'
                    Principal: '*'
                    Action: 's3:ListBucket'
                    Resource: !GetAtt Bucket.Arn
                    Condition:
                      StringLike:
                        'aws:PrincipalOrgPaths': !Ref PrincipalIdentifier
                  - Effect: 'Allow'
                    Principal: '*'
                    Action:
                      - 's3:GetObject'
                      - 's3:PutObject'
                    Resource: !Sub '${Bucket.Arn}/*'
                    Condition:
                      StringLike:
                        'aws:PrincipalOrgPaths': !Ref PrincipalIdentifier

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the shared S3 bucket'
    Value: !Ref Bucket
  BucketArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the shared S3 bucket'
    Value: !GetAtt Bucket.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates an IAM Role and Instance Profile for EC2 instances to integrate with Amazon CloudWatch (metrics, logs, traces via CloudWatch Agent) and AWS Systems Manager (SSM) Session Manager, inventory, and patch manager.'

Resources:
  EC2Role:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2Role'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore'
        - !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::aws:policy/CloudWatchAgentServerPolicy'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'

  InstanceProfile:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile'
    Properties:
      InstanceProfileName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InstanceProfile'
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2Role

Outputs:
  EC2RoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the IAM Role for EC2 instances to integrate with CloudWatch and SSM'
    Value: !GetAtt EC2Role.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2RoleArn'

  InstanceProfileArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Instance Profile for EC2 instances'
    Value: !GetAtt InstanceProfile.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InstanceProfileArn'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Creates a VPC, Security Group, S3 Bucket with encryption and public access blocked, and DynamoDB Table with deletion protection and server-side encryption.

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-vpc"

  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Default SG for stack
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  S3EncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub 'CMK for ${AWS::StackName} S3 bucket'
      Enabled: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Allow root
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow S3
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 's3.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
            Resource: '*'

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}-bucket"
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref S3EncryptionKey
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled

  S3BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnforceHTTPS
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn
              - !Sub "${S3Bucket.Arn}/*"
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  DynamoDBTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-table"
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: id
          AttributeType: S
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: id
          KeyType: HASH
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
        SSEType: KMS
      DeletionProtectionEnabled: true

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-VPCId"
  SecurityGroupId:
    Description: Security Group ID
    Value: !Ref SecurityGroup
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-SecurityGroupId"
  S3BucketName:
    Description: S3 Bucket Name
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-S3BucketName"
  DynamoDBTableName:
    Description: DynamoDB Table Name
    Value: !Ref DynamoDBTable
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-DynamoDBTableName"

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: |
  Deploys a VPC with a public subnet and internet access, an EC2 t3.micro instance running Amazon Linux 2023 with a security group allowing HTTP (port 80) inbound traffic, and a secure S3 bucket with encryption, versioning, ownership controls, public access blocked, and HTTPS-only bucket policy.

Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    us-east-1:
      AMI: ami-0533f2ba8a1995cf9
    us-east-2:
      AMI: ami-0d61e9558a5ddade9
    us-west-1:
      AMI: ami-0d5d9d301c853a04a
    us-west-2:
      AMI: ami-0a36f51200f4b8f1d
    ca-central-1:
      AMI: ami-0c3d4e5f6a7b8901
    eu-central-1:
      AMI: ami-06cd529e9e07e6e9f
    eu-west-1:
      AMI: ami-0c01cd6c573e930f6
    eu-west-2:
      AMI: ami-099ad40c1dd4a3492
    eu-west-3:
      AMI: ami-011d234f94579d1e9
    eu-north-1:
      AMI: ami-0a8b4cd432b1c3063
    ap-east-1:
      AMI: ami-0b1c2d3e4f5678901
    ap-south-1:
      AMI: ami-0c2d3e4f5a6b78901
    ap-northeast-1:
      AMI: ami-0d3e4f5a6b7c89012
    ap-northeast-2:
      AMI: ami-0e4f5a6b7c8d90123
    ap-northeast-3:
      AMI: ami-0f5a6b7c8d9e01234
    ap-southeast-1:
      AMI: ami-091ad1e18a3818db6
    ap-southeast-2:
      AMI: ami-0a2b3c4d5e6f78901
    ap-southeast-3:
      AMI: ami-0b3c4d5e6f7a89012
    ap-southeast-4:
      AMI: ami-0c4d5e6f7a8b90123
    sa-east-1:
      AMI: ami-0d5e6f7a8b9c01234
    af-south-1:
      AMI: ami-0e6f7a8b9c0d12345
    me-central-1:
      AMI: ami-0f7a8b9c0d1e23456
    me-south-1:
      AMI: ami-0a8b9c0d1e2f34567
    il-central-1:
      AMI: ami-0b9c0d1e2f3a45678

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-igw'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-rt'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Allow HTTP inbound traffic and all outbound traffic
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-sg'

  LaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-launch-template'
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AMI]
        InstanceType: t3.micro
        BlockDeviceMappings:
          - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
            Ebs:
              Encrypted: true
              VolumeSize: 8
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpTokens: required
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: 0
            SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
            Groups:
              - !Ref SecurityGroup
            AssociatePublicIpAddress: true

  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref LaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt LaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
            VolumeSize: 8
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ec2'

  KMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub 'KMS key for ${AWS::StackName} S3 bucket'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow S3 Service
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}-bucket-${AWS::Region}'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref KMSKey
            BucketKeyEnabled: true
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      OwnershipControls:
        Rules:
          - ObjectOwnership: BucketOwnerEnforced
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-bucket'

  BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: ForceSSL
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub '${S3Bucket.Arn}/*'
              - !Sub '${S3Bucket.Arn}'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

Outputs:
  EC2InstanceId:
    Description: ID of the EC2 instance
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2InstanceId'

  EC2PublicIp:
    Description: Public IP address of the EC2 instance
    Value: !GetAtt EC2Instance.PublicIp
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2PublicIp'

  S3BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-S3BucketName'

  SecurityGroupId:
    Description: ID of the security group
    Value: !Ref SecurityGroup
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SecurityGroupId'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template to provision an Amazon ECS cluster configured with Fargate and Fargate Spot capacity providers for cost-optimized, reliable workloads with container insights enabled.'

Resources:
  ECSCluster:
    Type: AWS::ECS::Cluster
    Properties:
      ClusterName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Cluster'
      CapacityProviders:
        - FARGATE
        - FARGATE_SPOT
      DefaultCapacityProviderStrategy:
        - CapacityProvider: FARGATE_SPOT
          Weight: 1
          Base: 1
        - CapacityProvider: FARGATE
          Weight: 1
          Base: 0
      ClusterSettings:
        - Name: containerInsights
          Value: enabled
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Cluster'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

Outputs:
  ClusterName:
    Description: Name of the ECS Cluster
    Value: !Ref ECSCluster
  ClusterArn:
    Description: ARN of the ECS Cluster
    Value: !GetAtt ECSCluster.Arn
  CapacityProviders:
    Description: List of Capacity Providers associated with the ECS Cluster
    Value: !Join [', ', ['FARGATE', 'FARGATE_SPOT']]

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: ECS Fargate task definition for NGINX with SSM-enabled roles and CloudWatch logging.

Resources:
  ECSExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AmazonECSTaskExecutionRolePolicy
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ECSExecutionRole'

  ECSTaskRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SSMControl'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssmmessages:CreateControlChannel
                  - ssmmessages:CreateDataChannel
                  - ssmmessages:OpenControlChannel
                  - ssmmessages:OpenDataChannel
                  - ssm:StartSession
                  - ssm:TerminateSession
                Resource: '*'
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ECSTaskRole'

  ECSLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ecs-logs'
      RetentionInDays: 7
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain

  ECSTaskDefinition:
    Type: AWS::ECS::TaskDefinition
    Properties:
      Family: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-nginx-task'
      NetworkMode: awsvpc
      Cpu: '256'
      Memory: '512'
      ExecutionRoleArn: !GetAtt ECSExecutionRole.Arn
      TaskRoleArn: !GetAtt ECSTaskRole.Arn
      RequiresCompatibilities:
        - FARGATE
      ContainerDefinitions:
        - Name: nginx
          Image: nginx:latest
          Essential: true
          PortMappings:
            - ContainerPort: 80
              Protocol: tcp
          LogConfiguration:
            LogDriver: awslogs
            Options:
              awslogs-group: !Ref ECSLogGroup
              awslogs-region: !Ref 'AWS::Region'
              awslogs-stream-prefix: ecs/
              awslogs-create-group: true

Outputs:
  TaskDefinitionArn:
    Description: ARN of the ECS Task Definition
    Value: !Ref ECSTaskDefinition
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TaskDefinitionArn'

  ExecutionRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the ECS Execution Role
    Value: !GetAtt ECSExecutionRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ExecutionRoleArn'

  TaskRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the ECS Task Role
    Value: !GetAtt ECSTaskRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TaskRoleArn'

  LogGroupArn:
    Description: ARN of the CloudWatch Log Group
    Value: !GetAtt ECSLogGroup.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LogGroupArn'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: |
  CloudFormation stack provisioning a Windows Server 2019 EC2 instance for CPU stress testing.
  Includes VPC, public subnet, SSM integration via IAM role, custom SSM document with PowerShell CPU stress script,
  and IAM role for FIS to trigger SSM commands, manage logs, and EC2 actions.

Parameters:
  WindowsAMI:
    Type: 'AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>'
    Default: '/aws/service/ami-windows-latest/Windows_Server-2019-English-Full-Base'
    Description: Latest Windows Server 2019 AMI resolved via SSM Parameter Store
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - t3.nano
      - t3.small
      - t3.medium
      - t3.large
    Default: t3.small
    Description: EC2 instance type for stress testing
  DurationSeconds:
    Type: Number
    Default: 300
    MinValue: 60
    Description: Default duration in seconds for the CPU stress test in SSM document

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.0.0/16'
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-igw'
  GatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 0
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet'
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-rt'
  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: SG for Windows stress test instance - RDP inbound, default all outbound
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3389
          ToPort: 3389
          CidrIp: !GetAtt VPC.CidrBlock
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-sg'
  EC2Role:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ec2-role'
  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2Role
  LaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: !Ref WindowsAMI
        InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Name: !Ref InstanceProfile
        Monitoring:
          Enabled: false
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: 0
            SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
            AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
            Groups:
              - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpTokens: 'required'
          HttpEndpoint: 'enabled'
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64: !Sub |
            <powershell>
            Rename-Computer -NewName "${AWS::StackName}-stress-test" -Force -Restart
            </powershell>
      TagSpecifications:
        - ResourceType: launch-template
          Tags:
            - Key: Name
              Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-launch-template'
  StressTestInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref LaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt LaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeType: gp3
            VolumeSize: 30
            Encrypted: true
            DeleteOnTermination: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-stress-test'
  CpuStressTestDocument:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Document
    Properties:
      DocumentType: Command
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-CpuStressTest'
      Content: !Sub |
        {
          "schemaVersion": "2.2",
          "description": "CPU stress test document. Requires PowerShell 5.0+. Spawns background jobs equal to logical processors, each running CPU-intensive loops for DurationInSeconds.",
          "parameters": {
            "DurationInSeconds": {
              "type": "String",
              "default": "${DurationSeconds}",
              "description": "Duration of stress test in seconds"
            }
          },
          "mainSteps": [
            {
              "action": "aws:runPowerShellScript",
              "name": "cpuStressTest",
              "inputs": {
                "runCommand": [
                  "$numProcs = [Environment]::ProcessorCount",
                  "Write-Output \"Detected $numProcs logical processors\"",
                  "$endTime = (Get-Date).AddSeconds( {{ DurationInSeconds }} )",
                  "Write-Output \"Stress test will run until $endTime\"",
                  "$jobs = @()",
                  "for ($i = 0; $i -lt $numProcs; $i++) {",
                  "  $jobs += Start-Job -ScriptBlock {",
                  "    param($endTime)",
                  "    $iteration = 0",
                  "    while ((Get-Date) -lt $endTime) {",
                  "      $sum = 0",
                  "      for ($j = 0; $j -lt 1000000; $j++) {",
                  "        $sum += $j % 7",
                  "      }",
                  "      $iteration++",
                  "    }",
                  "    Write-Output \"Job $using:i completed after approx $iteration iterations\"",
                  "  } -ArgumentList $endTime",
                  "}",
                  "Write-Output \"Started $numProcs background jobs for CPU stress\"",
                  "Wait-Job $jobs",
                  "Receive-Job $jobs | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_ }",
                  "Remove-Job $jobs -Force",
                  "Write-Output \"CPU stress test completed successfully\""
                ]
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-CpuStressTest'
        - Key: DurationSeconds
          Value: !Ref DurationSeconds
  FISRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: fis.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-fis-policy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: ssm:SendCommand
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:ssm:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:document/${CpuStressTestDocument}'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: ssm:GetCommandInvocation
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                  - logs:DescribeLogGroups
                Resource: 'arn:aws:logs:*:*:log-group:/aws/ssm/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ec2:DescribeInstances
                  - ec2:RebootInstances
                  - ec2:StopInstances
                  - ec2:StartInstances
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:ec2:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:instance/${StressTestInstance}'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-fis-role'

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: 'EC2 Instance ID. Connect via SSM Session Manager: aws ssm start-session --target [InstanceId] --document-name AWS-StartPortForwardingSession --parameters "{\"portNumber\":[\"3389\"],\"localPortNumber\":[\"3389\"]} "'
    Value: !Ref StressTestInstance
  SSMDocumentName:
    Description: Name/ARN of the custom SSM document. Use with ssm:send-command targeting the instance.
    Value: !Ref CpuStressTestDocument
  FISRoleArn:
    Description: IAM Role ARN for Fault Injection Simulator (FIS) to invoke SSM document, manage logs, and EC2 actions on this instance.
    Value: !GetAtt FISRole.Arn
  PublicIpAddress:
    Description: Public IP address of the EC2 instance. RDP (3389) allowed from anywhere for testing. Prefer SSM Session Manager for secure access.
    Value: !GetAtt StressTestInstance.PublicIp

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "Tiered IAM roles for FIS access control with Security Admin, Admin, User, and Non-User permissions"

Resources:
  SecurityAdminRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-SecurityAdminRole"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: true
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/ReadOnlyAccess
      Policies:

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Deploys an environment-specific DynamoDB table for SupporterProductData, configured for PROD (provisioned throughput with write auto-scaling) or CODE (on-demand) environments based on the Stage parameter.'

Parameters:
  Stage:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues: ['PROD', 'CODE']
    Default: 'CODE'
    Description: 'Deployment environment (PROD or CODE).'

Conditions:
  IsProd: !Equals [!Ref Stage, 'PROD']

Resources:
  SupporterProductDataTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub 'SupporterProductData-${Stage}'
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: 'id'
          KeyType: 'HASH'
        - AttributeName: 'sortKey'
          KeyType: 'RANGE'
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: 'id'
          AttributeType: 'S'
        - AttributeName: 'sortKey'
          AttributeType: 'S'
      BillingMode: !If [IsProd, 'PROVISIONED', 'PAY_PER_REQUEST']
      ProvisionedThroughput: !If
        - IsProd
        - ReadCapacityUnits: 20
          WriteCapacityUnits: 5
        - !Ref 'AWS::NoValue'
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
      TimeToLiveSpecification:
        Enabled: true
        AttributeName: 'expiryDate'
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Name'
          Value: !Sub 'SupporterProductData-${Stage}'
        - Key: 'Environment'
          Value: !Ref Stage
        - Key: 'Backup'
          Value: 'true'

  WriteScalableTarget:
    Type: AWS::ApplicationAutoScaling::ScalableTarget
    Condition: IsProd
    Properties:
      ServiceNamespace: 'dynamodb'
      ResourceId: !Sub 'table/${SupporterProductDataTable}'
      ScalableDimension: 'dynamodb:table:WriteCapacityUnits'
      MinCapacity: 5
      MaxCapacity: 500

  WriteScalingPolicy:
    Type: AWS::ApplicationAutoScaling::ScalingPolicy
    Condition: IsProd
    DependsOn: WriteScalableTarget
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub '${SupporterProductDataTable}-WriteScaling'
      ServiceNamespace: 'dynamodb'
      ResourceId: !Sub 'table/${SupporterProductDataTable}'
      ScalableDimension: 'dynamodb:table:WriteCapacityUnits'
      PolicyType: 'TargetTrackingScaling'
      TargetTrackingScalingPolicyConfiguration:
        PredefinedMetricSpecification:
          PredefinedMetricType: 'DynamoDBWriteCapacityUtilization'
        TargetValue: 70.0
        ScaleOutCooldown: 60
        ScaleInCooldown: 60

Outputs:
  TableName:
    Description: 'SupporterProductData table name'
    Value: !Ref SupporterProductDataTable
  TableArn:
    Description: 'SupporterProductData table ARN'
    Value: !GetAtt SupporterProductDataTable.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates three IAM managed policies: S3 Access Policy for iOS application read/write access to ios-apps.sagebridge.org bucket, DynamoDB Protection Policy to deny deletion and schema modifications, and RDS Protection Policy to deny destructive operations.'

Resources:
  S3AccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-S3AccessPolicy'
      Description: 'Grants an iOS application read/write access to a specific S3 bucket (ios-apps.sagebridge.org), including object operations (upload, download, delete) and bucket listing/location permissions.'
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:ListBucket
              - s3:GetBucketLocation
            Resource: 'arn:aws:s3:::ios-apps.sagebridge.org'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
            Resource: 'arn:aws:s3:::ios-apps.sagebridge.org/*'

  DynamoDBProtectionPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DynamoDBProtectionPolicy'
      Description: 'Explicitly denies deletion or schema-modification actions (e.g., DeleteTable, UpdateTable) to prevent accidental data loss in DynamoDB.'
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - dynamodb:DeleteTable
              - dynamodb:UpdateTable
            Resource: '*'

  RDSProtectionPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RDSProtectionPolicy'
      Description: 'Blocks destructive RDS operations (e.g., DeleteDBInstance, DeleteDBCluster) to safeguard databases and backups.'
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - rds:DeleteDBInstance
              - rds:DeleteDBCluster
            Resource: '*'

Outputs:
  S3AccessPolicyArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the S3 Access Policy for iOS app access to ios-apps.sagebridge.org bucket'
    Value: !GetAtt S3AccessPolicy.PolicyArn
  DynamoDBProtectionPolicyArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the DynamoDB Protection Policy to prevent accidental data loss'
    Value: !GetAtt DynamoDBProtectionPolicy.PolicyArn
  RDSProtectionPolicyArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the RDS Protection Policy to safeguard databases and backups'
    Value: !GetAtt RDSProtectionPolicy.PolicyArn

Description: 'CloudFormation template to create an IAM role for Bedrock agents assumable only by Bedrock service in the same account, scoped to agent resources, granting permissions to invoke foundation models and Lambda functions.'

Resources:

Description: 'AWS Resource Group using tag-based filters to group resources from EC2, RDS, SageMaker, SSM, and similar services'

Parameters:
  TagKey:
    Type: String
    Default: 'Environment'
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z0-9-_]+$'
  TagValue:
    Type: String
    Default: 'Production'

Resources:
  ResourceGroup:
    Type: AWS::ResourceGroups::Group
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Group'
      Description: !Sub 'Group of resources tagged ${TagKey} ${TagValue} across multiple services'
      ResourceQuery:
        Type: 'TAG_FILTERS_1_0'
        Query:
          TagFilters:
            - Key: !Ref TagKey
              Values: [!Ref TagValue]
          ResourceTypeFilters:
            - AWS::EC2::Instance
            - AWS::RDS::DBInstance
            - AWS::SageMaker::NotebookInstance
            - AWS::SSM::ManagedInstance
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Environment'
          Value: !Ref TagValue
        - Key: 'ManagedBy'
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

Outputs:
  GroupName:
    Description: 'Name of the created Resource Group'
    Value: !Ref ResourceGroup
  GroupArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the created Resource Group for querying or integration'
    Value: !GetAtt ResourceGroup.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template that creates an encrypted S3 bucket for ALB access logs with private access, enforced bucket ownership, 90-day retention policy, and bucket policy allowing AWS ELB accounts and delivery.logs.amazonaws.com to write logs, ensuring compliance with AWS requirements for ALB logging while restricting public access.'

Resources:
  ALBAccessLogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-alb-access-logs-${AWS::StackName}"
      OwnershipControls:
        Rules:
          - ObjectOwnership: BucketOwnerEnforced
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !GetAtt ALBAccessLogsKmsKey.Arn
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: ExpireOldLogs
            Status: Enabled
            Prefix: AWSLogs/
            ExpirationInDays: 90
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: ALBAccessLogs

  ALBAccessLogsKmsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub 'KMS key for ${AWS::StackName} ALB logs encryption'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnableIAMUserPermissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowS3
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowLogDelivery
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowELB
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: 'arn:aws:iam::127311923021:root'
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: ALBAccessLogs

  ALBAccessLogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref ALBAccessLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt ALBAccessLogsBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${ALBAccessLogsBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: ALBLogDeliveryWrite
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action: 's3:PutObject'
            Resource: !Sub '${ALBAccessLogsBucket.Arn}/AWSLogs/${AWS::AccountId}/*'
          - Sid: ALBLogDeliveryAclCheck
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action: 's3:GetBucketAcl'
            Resource: !GetAtt ALBAccessLogsBucket.Arn
          - Sid: ELBLogDeliveryWrite
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: 'arn:aws:iam::127311923021:root'
            Action: 's3:PutObject'
            Resource: !Sub '${ALBAccessLogsBucket.Arn}/AWSLogs/${AWS::AccountId}/*'

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the ALB Access Logs Bucket'
    Value: !Ref ALBAccessLogsBucket
  BucketArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the ALB Access Logs Bucket'
    Value: !GetAtt ALBAccessLogsBucket.Arn
  BucketId:
    Description: 'ID (Name) of the ALB Access Logs Bucket'
    Value: !Ref ALBAccessLogsBucket

Description: Deploys a Transit Gateway with predefined BGP settings (ASN 65000), automatic attachment acceptance, and default route propagation/association, and shares it via AWS RAM to account 644519422710 for centralized cross-account network connectivity.

    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      AmazonSideAsn: 65000
      AutoAcceptSharedAttachments: enable
      DefaultRouteTableAssociation: enable
      DefaultRouteTablePropagation: enable
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-tgw'

  TransitGatewayShare:
    Type: AWS::RAM::ResourceShare
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-tgw-share'
      Principals:
        - '644519422710'
      ResourceArns:
        - !Sub 'arn:aws:ec2:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:transit-gateway/${TransitGateway}'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-tgw-share'

Outputs:
  TransitGatewayId:
    Value: !Ref TransitGateway
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TransitGatewayId'
  ResourceShareId:
    Value: !Ref TransitGatewayShare
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ResourceShareId'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Secure, cost-optimized S3 bucket for CloudWatch export data storage with configurable versioning and lifecycle policies

Parameters:
  EnableVersioning:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - true
      - false
    Default: true
    Description: Enable S3 versioning
  DaysToStandardIA:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    MinValue: 30
    MaxValue: 365
    Description: Days after which to transition to STANDARD_IA
  DaysToGlacierInstantRetrieval:
    Type: Number
    Default: 90
    MinValue: 90
    MaxValue: 730
    Description: Days after which to transition to GLACIER_IR
  DaysToExpire:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1095
    MinValue: 365
    MaxValue: 3650
    Description: Days after which to expire objects

Conditions:
  VersioningEnabled: !Equals [!Ref EnableVersioning, "true"]

Resources:
  KmsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      Description: "CMK for CloudWatch export S3 encryption"
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable root permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: "kms:*"
            Resource: "*"
          - Sid: AllowCloudWatchLogsService
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: !Sub "logs.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com"
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: "*"

  Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-cloudwatch-exports-${AWS::StackName}'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      OwnershipControls:
        Rules:
          - ObjectOwnership: BucketOwnerEnforced
      VersioningConfiguration:
        !If
        - VersioningEnabled
        - Status: Enabled
        - Status: Suspended
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !GetAtt KmsKey.Arn
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: CloudWatchExportsLifecycle
            Status: Enabled
            Prefix: "*"
            Transitions:
              - TransitionInDays: !Ref DaysToStandardIA
                StorageClass: STANDARD_IA
              - TransitionInDays: !Ref DaysToGlacierInstantRetrieval
                StorageClass: GLACIER_IR
            ExpirationInDays: !Ref DaysToExpire
            NoncurrentVersionTransitions:
              - TransitionInDays: 30
                StorageClass: STANDARD_IA
              - TransitionInDays: 60
                StorageClass: GLACIER_IR
            NoncurrentVersionExpirationInDays: 90
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CloudWatchExportStorage
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyUnsecureCommunications
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: "*"
            Action: "s3:*"
            Resource:
              - !Sub "arn:${AWS::Partition}:s3:::${Bucket}"
              - !Sub "arn:${AWS::Partition}:s3:::${Bucket}/*"
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: false
          - Sid: AllowCloudWatchLogsService
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: !Sub "logs.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com"
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
            Resource: !Sub "arn:${AWS::Partition}:s3:::${Bucket}/*"
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Value: !Ref Bucket
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket
  BucketArn:
    Value: !GetAtt Bucket.Arn
    Description: ARN of the S3 bucket
  LifecycleRuleId:
    Value: CloudWatchExportsLifecycle
    Description: ID of the lifecycle rule

Description: 'Activates a GuardDuty detector for EC2 malicious activity monitoring.'

Resources:
  GuardDutyDetector:
    Type: 'AWS::GuardDuty::Detector'
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Enable: true
      FindingPublishingFrequency: ONE_HOUR
      DataSources:
        MalwareProtection:
          ScanEc2InstanceWithFindings:
            EbsVolumes: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-GuardDutyDetector'

Outputs:
  DetectorId:
    Description: 'The ID of the GuardDuty detector.'
    Value: !GetAtt GuardDutyDetector.Id
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DetectorId'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Parameters:
  ServiceRoleArn:
    Type: String
    AllowedPattern: '^(|arn:aws:iam::\d{12}:role/[a-zA-Z0-9+=,.@_/-]+)$'
    Default: ''
    Description: ARN of the service role for KMS key usage

Conditions:
  UseServiceRole: !Not [!Equals [!Ref ServiceRoleArn, '']]

Resources:
  ArtifactKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for Lambda artifacts S3 encryption
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable root account full access
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - !If
            - UseServiceRole
            - Sid: Enable service role usage
              Effect: Allow
              Principal:
                AWS: !Ref ServiceRoleArn
              Action:
                - kms:Encrypt
                - kms:Decrypt
                - kms:ReEncrypt*
                - kms:GenerateDataKey*
                - kms:DescribeKey
              Resource: '*'
            - !Ref 'AWS::NoValue'

  ArtifactKMSAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub 'alias/${AWS::StackName}-lambda-artifacts-key'
      TargetKeyId: !Ref ArtifactKMSKey

  ArtifactBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-lambda-artifacts-${AWS::StackName}'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref ArtifactKMSKey
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
            BucketKeyEnabled: true

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket for Lambda artifacts
    Value: !Ref ArtifactBucket
  BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the S3 bucket for Lambda artifacts
    Value: !GetAtt ArtifactBucket.Arn
  KMSKeyId:
    Description: ID of the KMS key for S3 encryption
    Value: !Ref ArtifactKMSKey
  KMSKeyAliasArn:
    Description: ARN of the KMS key alias
    Value: !Ref ArtifactKMSAlias

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates an IAM execution role for AWS Service Catalog to securely provision and manage S3, Lambda, CloudFormation, IAM, and SNS resources.'

Resources:
  ServiceCatalogExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ServiceCatalogExecutionRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: servicecatalog.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonS3FullAccess
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AWSLambdaExecute
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ServiceCatalogInlinePolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - servicecatalog:ProvisionProduct
                  - servicecatalog:UpdateProvisionedProduct
                  - servicecatalog:TerminateProvisionedProduct
                  - servicecatalog:DescribeProvisionedProduct
                  - servicecatalog:SearchProducts
                  - servicecatalog:DescribeProduct
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - iam:CreateRole
                  - iam:DeleteRole
                  - iam:UpdateRole
                  - iam:AttachRolePolicy
                  - iam:DetachRolePolicy
                  - iam:PutRolePolicy
                  - iam:DeleteRolePolicy
                  - iam:PassRole
                  - iam:GetRole
                  - iam:ListRoles
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - lambda:CreateFunction
                  - lambda:DeleteFunction
                  - lambda:UpdateFunctionCode
                  - lambda:UpdateFunctionConfiguration
                  - lambda:AddPermission
                  - lambda:RemovePermission
                  - lambda:ListFunctions
                  - lambda:GetFunction
                  - lambda:TagResource
                  - lambda:UntagResource
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - cloudformation:CreateStack
                  - cloudformation:UpdateStack
                  - cloudformation:DeleteStack
                  - cloudformation:DescribeStacks
                  - cloudformation:DescribeStackEvents
                  - cloudformation:DescribeStackResources
                  - cloudformation:ListStackResources
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sns:CreateTopic
                  - sns:DeleteTopic
                  - sns:Publish
                  - sns:Subscribe
                  - sns:Unsubscribe
                  - sns:ListTopics
                  - sns:ListSubscriptionsByTopic
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ServiceCatalogExecutionRole'

Outputs:
  ServiceCatalogRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Service Catalog Execution Role'
    Value: !GetAtt ServiceCatalogExecutionRole.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for EC2 Image Builder infrastructure: S3 bucket for logs, IAM role with SSM and S3 permissions, and instance profile for secure AMI creation and management.'

Resources:
  ImageBuilderLogsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      KeyUsage: ENCRYPT_DECRYPT
      Description: 'KMS key for Image Builder logs bucket encryption'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      Tags:
        - Key: OwnerEmail
          Value: u12345678@anu.edu.au
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'

  LogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-imagebuilder-logs-${AWS::StackName}'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref ImageBuilderLogsKey
            BucketKeyEnabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: OwnerEmail
          Value: u12345678@anu.edu.au

  ImageBuilderS3LogsPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: ImageBuilderS3LogsPolicy
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${LogsBucket}/*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:ListBucket
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${LogsBucket}'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:ListAllMyBuckets
            Resource: '*'

  ImageBuilderInstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: ImageBuilderInstanceRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
        - !Ref ImageBuilderS3LogsPolicy
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: ImageBuilderInlinePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ec2:CreateTags
                  - ec2:DescribeInstances
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: ssmmessages:*
                Resource: '*'

  ImageBuilderInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      InstanceProfileName: ImageBuilderInstanceProfile
      Roles:
        - !Ref ImageBuilderInstanceRole

Outputs:
  LogsBucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket for Image Builder logs
    Value: !Ref LogsBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LogsBucketName'

  ImageBuilderInstanceRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the IAM role for Image Builder EC2 instances
    Value: !GetAtt ImageBuilderInstanceRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ImageBuilderInstanceRoleArn'

  ImageBuilderInstanceProfileArn:
    Description: ARN of the IAM instance profile for Image Builder
    Value: !GetAtt ImageBuilderInstanceProfile.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ImageBuilderInstanceProfileArn'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket to store VPC flow logs with AES256 encryption, versioning, lifecycle management, strict bucket policy for delivery.logs.amazonaws.com, and public access blocks.'

Parameters:
  CustomBucketName:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    AllowedPattern: '^$|^[a-z0-9]([a-z0-9-]{1,61}[a-z0-9])?$'
    MaxLength: 63
    Description: 'Optional custom S3 bucket name; leave empty for auto-generated'
  VersioningStatus:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - Enabled
      - Suspended
    Default: Enabled
  TransitionToGlacierDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 365000
  RetentionDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 365000
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 365000

Conditions:
  UseCustomName:
    Fn::Not:
      - Fn::Equals:
          - !Ref CustomBucketName
          - ''

Resources:
  FlowLogsBucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName:
        Fn::If:
          - UseCustomName
          - !Ref CustomBucketName
          - !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc-flowlogs-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: !Ref VersioningStatus
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !GetAtt FlowLogsKMSKey.Arn
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: FlowLogsLifecycle
            Status: Enabled
            Transitions:
              - TransitionInDays: !Ref TransitionToGlacierDays
                StorageClass: GLACIER
            ExpirationInDays: !Ref RetentionDays
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true

  FlowLogsKMSKey:
    Type: 'AWS::KMS::Key'
    Properties:
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowFlowLogsService
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
            Resource: '*'

  FlowLogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::BucketPolicy'
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref FlowLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowFlowLogsDelivery
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${FlowLogsBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                's3:x-amz-acl': bucket-owner-full-control
          - Sid: AllowFlowLogsGetBucketACL
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:GetBucketAcl
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${FlowLogsBucket}'
          - Sid: DenyInsecureAccess
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: s3:*
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${FlowLogsBucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${FlowLogsBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the VPC Flow Logs S3 bucket'
    Value: !Ref FlowLogsBucket
  BucketArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the VPC Flow Logs S3 bucket'
    Value: !GetAtt FlowLogsBucket.Arn
  BucketPolicyStatus:
    Description: 'Bucket policy attached enforcing secure access (HTTPS only) and permissions for delivery.logs.amazonaws.com service for VPC Flow Logs ingestion'
    Value: Enforced
  KeyArn:
    Description: 'KMS key ARN for VPC flow logs bucket encryption'
    Value: !GetAtt FlowLogsKMSKey.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'EC2 with SSM automated Nginx installation and S3 logging'

Mappings:
  AmazonLinux2AMI:
    us-east-1:
      AMI: ami-0c02fb55956c7d316
    us-east-2:
      AMI: ami-0a313d6098716f372
    us-west-2:
      AMI: ami-0d5d9d301c853a04a
    eu-west-1:
      AMI: ami-0a2bdc7a6d92a2a4e
    eu-central-1:
      AMI: ami-0badb1a28822a0e5b
    ap-southeast-1:
      AMI: ami-0b3c8d6f2e4a8b5c1
    ap-northeast-1:
      AMI: ami-0d3c8d6f2e4a8b5c1

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRT'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  WebServerSG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for web server with HTTP access
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-WebServerSG'

  LogBucketKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub 'KMS key for ${AWS::StackName} log bucket encryption'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyUsage: 'ENCRYPT_DECRYPT'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Enable root/admin access'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow S3 service for SSE-KMS'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringLike:
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub 's3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LogBucketKey'

  LogBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::Region}-logs-${AWS::AccountId}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref LogBucketKey
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-logs'

  LogBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref LogBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'SSMOutputAccess'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ssm.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject*
              - s3:GetObject*
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${LogBucket}/logs/*'

  EC2SSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: S3LogAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:ListBucket
                  - kms:Encrypt
                  - kms:Decrypt
                  - kms:ReEncrypt*
                  - kms:GenerateDataKey*
                  - kms:DescribeKey
                Resource:
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${LogBucket}'
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${LogBucket}/*'
                  - !GetAtt LogBucketKey.Arn

  EC2InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2SSMRole

  WebServerLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: !FindInMap [AmazonLinux2AMI, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AMI]
        InstanceType: t3.micro
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Arn: !GetAtt EC2InstanceProfile.Arn
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: 0
            SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
            Groups:
              - !Ref WebServerSG
            AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpEndpoint: 'disabled'
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64: |
            #!/bin/bash
            # Ensure SSM agent is running
            systemctl enable amazon-ssm-agent
            systemctl start amazon-ssm-agent
        TagSpecifications:
          - ResourceType: instance
            Tags:
              - Key: Name
                Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-WebServer'

  WebServerInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref WebServerLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt WebServerLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      DisableApiTermination: false
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeType: gp3
            VolumeSize: 8
            Encrypted: true

  NginxInstallAssociation:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Association
    Properties:
      Name: 'AWS-RunShellScript'
      Targets:
        - Key: InstanceIds
          Values:
            - !Ref WebServerInstance
      Parameters:
        commands:
          - yum update -y
          - yum install -y nginx
          - systemctl start nginx
          - systemctl enable nginx
          - systemctl status nginx
      OutputLocation:
        S3Location:
          OutputS3BucketName: !Ref LogBucket
          OutputS3KeyPrefix: 'logs/'

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: EC2 Instance ID
    Value: !Ref WebServerInstance
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InstanceId'

  PublicIp:
    Description: Public IP of the EC2 instance
    Value: !GetAtt WebServerInstance.PublicIp
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicIp'

  LogBucketName:
    Description: S3 Bucket for logs
    Value: !Ref LogBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LogBucketName'

  AssociationId:
    Description: SSM Association ID
    Value: !Ref NginxInstallAssociation
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AssociationId'
