final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: |
  Production-ready VPC network infrastructure with one public subnet and two private subnets across three Availability Zones, security groups allowing HTTP/HTTPS, SSH, PostgreSQL, and internal VPC traffic, internal Application Load Balancer with default HTTP listener, private ECR repository with image scanning, and SSM Parameter Store entries for key resource IDs.

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-igw'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-1'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [2, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-2'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-rt'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
  NatEIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-nat-eip'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  NatGateway:
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NatEIP.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-nat'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-rt'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  PrivateRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway
  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
  AlbSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for internal ALB allowing HTTP/HTTPS/SSH inbound
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-alb-sg'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  AlbSGIngressHTTP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupIngress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref AlbSecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 80
      ToPort: 80
      CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
  AlbSGIngressHTTPS:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupIngress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref AlbSecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 443
      ToPort: 443
      CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
  AlbSGIngressSSH:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupIngress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref AlbSecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 22
      ToPort: 22
      CidrIp: !GetAtt VPC.CidrBlock
  AppSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for application allowing ALB, SSH, and VPC traffic
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-app-sg'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  AppSGIngressHTTP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupIngress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref AppSecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 80
      ToPort: 80
      SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref AlbSecurityGroup
  AppSGIngressHTTPS:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupIngress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref AppSecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 443
      ToPort: 443
      SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref AlbSecurityGroup
  AppSGIngressSSH:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupIngress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref AppSecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 22
      ToPort: 22
      CidrIp: !GetAtt VPC.CidrBlock
  AppSGIngressVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupIngress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref AppSecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: -1
      CidrIp: !GetAtt VPC.CidrBlock
  DbSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for PostgreSQL DB allowing app and VPC traffic
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-db-sg'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  DbSGIngressPostgres:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupIngress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref DbSecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 5432
      ToPort: 5432
      SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref AppSecurityGroup
  DbSGIngressVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupIngress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref DbSecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: -1
      CidrIp: !GetAtt VPC.CidrBlock
  ALB:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-alb'
      Scheme: internal
      Subnets:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref AlbSecurityGroup
      Type: application
      LoadBalancerAttributes:
        - Key: routing.http.drop_invalid_header_fields.enabled
          Value: 'true'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-alb'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  Listener:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::Listener
    Properties:
      LoadBalancerArn: !Ref ALB
      Port: 80
      Protocol: HTTP
      DefaultActions:
        - Type: redirect
          RedirectConfig:
            Protocol: HTTPS
            Port: '443'
            StatusCode: 'HTTP_301'
  Repository:
    Type: AWS::ECR::Repository
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      RepositoryName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}-app-repo'
      ImageScanningConfiguration:
        ScanOnPush: true
      ImageTagMutability: IMMUTABLE
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ecr'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  VpcIdParameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '/${AWS::StackName}/vpc-id'
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        Stack: !Ref AWS::StackName
  PublicSubnetIdParameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '/${AWS::StackName}/public-subnet-id'
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref PublicSubnet
      Tags:
        Stack: !Ref AWS::StackName
  PrivateSubnet1IdParameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '/${AWS::StackName}/private-subnet-1-id'
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      Tags:
        Stack: !Ref AWS::StackName
  PrivateSubnet2IdParameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '/${AWS::StackName}/private-subnet-2-id'
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      Tags:
        Stack: !Ref AWS::StackName
  AlbSecurityGroupIdParameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '/${AWS::StackName}/alb-sg-id'
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref AlbSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        Stack: !Ref AWS::StackName
  AppSecurityGroupIdParameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '/${AWS::StackName}/app-sg-id'
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref AppSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        Stack: !Ref AWS::StackName
  DbSecurityGroupIdParameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '/${AWS::StackName}/db-sg-id'
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref DbSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        Stack: !Ref AWS::StackName
  AlbListenerArnParameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '/${AWS::StackName}/alb-listener-arn'
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref Listener
      Tags:
        Stack: !Ref AWS::StackName
  EcrRepositoryUriParameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '/${AWS::StackName}/ecr-uri'
      Type: String
      Value: !GetAtt Repository.RepositoryUri
      Tags:
        Stack: !Ref AWS::StackName

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation stack for AWS Amplify TodoApp with production branch'

Resources:
  TodoAppRepo:
    Type: AWS::CodeCommit::Repository
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      RepositoryName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-todoapp-repo'
      RepositoryDescription: 'CodeCommit repository for TodoApp Amplify web application'
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Name'
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  TodoAppApp:
    Type: AWS::Amplify::App
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-todoapp'
      Description: 'Amplify web application for TodoApp'
      Platform: WEB
      CustomRules:
        - Source: '/<*>'
          Target: '/index.html'
          Status: '200'
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Name'
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  ProductionBranch:
    Type: AWS::Amplify::Branch
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      AppId: !GetAtt TodoAppApp.AppId
      BranchName: 'production'
      Description: 'Production branch for TodoApp hosting and deployment'
      EnableAutoBuild: true
      Stage: 'PRODUCTION'
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Name'
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

Outputs:
  TodoAppRepoCloneUrlHttp:
    Description: 'HTTPS clone URL to push TodoApp code'
    Value: !GetAtt TodoAppRepo.CloneUrlHttp
  TodoAppAppId:
    Description: 'Amplify App ID'
    Value: !GetAtt TodoAppApp.AppId
  ProductionBranchArn:
    Description: 'Production branch ARN for hosting'
    Value: !Ref ProductionBranch

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Deploys a secure, multi-AZ VPC architecture with public/private subnets and NAT Gateway connectivity following AWS Well-Architected security best practices.

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InternetGateway'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetA'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  PublicSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetB'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  PrivateSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnetA'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  PrivateSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.4.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnetB'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  EIP1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EIP1'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  EIP2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EIP2'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  NATGatewayA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIP1.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetA
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NATGatewayA'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  NATGatewayB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIP2.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetB
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NATGatewayB'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetARouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnetBRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetB
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PrivateRouteTableA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRouteTableA'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  PrivateRouteA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTableA
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NATGatewayA

  PrivateSubnetARouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTableA

  PrivateRouteTableB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRouteTableB'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  PrivateRouteB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTableB
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NATGatewayB

  PrivateSubnetBRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetB
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTableB

  PublicNACL:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAcl
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicNACL'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  PublicNACLInboundHTTP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNACL
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 80
        To: 80
      Egress: false

  PublicNACLInboundHTTPS:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNACL
      RuleNumber: 110
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 443
        To: 443
      Egress: false

  PublicNACLEphemeralInbound:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNACL
      RuleNumber: 300
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535
      Egress: false

  PublicNACLEphemeralOutboundTCP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNACL
      RuleNumber: 400
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535
      Egress: true

  PublicNACLEphemeralOutboundUDP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNACL
      RuleNumber: 410
      Protocol: 17
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535
      Egress: true

  PrivateNACL:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAcl
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateNACL'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  PrivateNACLEphemeralInbound:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateNACL
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535
      Egress: false

  PrivateNACLHTTPOutbound:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateNACL
      RuleNumber: 200
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 80
        To: 80
      Egress: true

  PrivateNACLHTTPSOutbound:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateNACL
      RuleNumber: 300
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 443
        To: 443
      Egress: true

  PublicSubnetANACLAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetA
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNACL

  PublicSubnetBNACLAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetB
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNACL

  PrivateSubnetANACLAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetA
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateNACL

  PrivateSubnetBNACLAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetB
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PrivateNACL

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: ID of the VPC
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPCId'

  PublicSubnetIds:
    Description: Comma-separated list of Public Subnet IDs
    Value: !Join [",", [!Ref PublicSubnetA, !Ref PublicSubnetB]]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetIds'

  PrivateSubnetIds:
    Description: Comma-separated list of Private Subnet IDs
    Value: !Join [",", [!Ref PrivateSubnetA, !Ref PrivateSubnetB]]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnetIds'

  NatGatewayIds:
    Description: Comma-separated list of NAT Gateway IDs
    Value: !Join [",", [!Ref NATGatewayA, !Ref NATGatewayB]]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NatGatewayIds'

  RouteTableIds:
    Description: Comma-separated list of Route Table IDs
    Value: !Join [",", [!Ref PublicRouteTable, !Ref PrivateRouteTableA, !Ref PrivateRouteTableB]]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RouteTableIds'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Standardized IAM baseline with secure roles, groups, cross-account trusts, and execution roles for governance and IaC'

Parameters:
  IdentityManagementAccountId:
    Type: String
    AllowedPattern: '^\d{12}$'
    Default: '111122223333'
  ToolingManagementAccountId:
    Type: String
    AllowedPattern: '^\d{12}$'
    Default: '222233334444'

Resources:
  PrivilegedAdminRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivilegedAdmin'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: '*'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                sts:MultifactorAuthPresent: 'true'
                aws:PrincipalAccount:
                  - !Ref IdentityManagementAccountId
                  - !Ref ToolingManagementAccountId
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivilegedAdminPolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - billing:*
                  - cloudhsm:*
                Resource: '*'
              - Sid: DenyElevatedWithoutMFA
                Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - iam:CreateRole
                  - iam:AttachRolePolicy
                  - iam:UpdateAssumeRolePolicy
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  Bool:
                    aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: false
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - iam:*
                  - ec2:*
                  - s3:Get*
                  - s3:List*
                  - s3:Put*
                  - s3:Delete*
                  - s3:CreateBucket
                  - s3:DeleteBucket
                  - lambda:*
                  - rds:*
                  - cloudformation:*
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  RestrictedAdminRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RestrictedAdmin'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: '*'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                sts:MultifactorAuthPresent: 'true'
                aws:PrincipalAccount:
                  - !Ref IdentityManagementAccountId
                  - !Ref ToolingManagementAccountId
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RestrictedAdminPolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - billing:*
                  - cloudhsm:*
                  - iam:*
                Resource: '*'
              - Sid: DenyElevatedWithoutMFA
                Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - ec2:RunInstances
                  - ec2:TerminateInstances
                  - ec2:StartInstances
                  - ec2:StopInstances
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:DeleteObject
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  Bool:
                    aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: false
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ec2:Describe*
                  - ec2:List*
                  - s3:Get*
                  - s3:List*
                  - cloudformation:*
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  IdentityAdminRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IdentityAdmin'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: '*'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                sts:MultifactorAuthPresent: 'true'
                aws:PrincipalAccount:
                  - !Ref IdentityManagementAccountId
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IdentityAdminPolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - billing:*
                  - cloudhsm:*
                Resource: '*'
              - Sid: DenyElevatedWithoutMFA
                Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - iam:DeleteRolePolicy
                  - iam:DeleteRole
                  - iam:DeleteUser
                  - iam:DeleteAccessKey
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  Bool:
                    aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: false
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - iam:*
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PrivilegedAdminGroup:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Group
    Properties:
      GroupName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivilegedAdminGroup'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivilegedAdminGroupPolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - billing:*
                  - cloudhsm:*
                Resource: '*'
              - Sid: DenyElevatedWithoutMFA
                Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - iam:CreateRole
                  - iam:AttachRolePolicy
                  - iam:UpdateAssumeRolePolicy
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  Bool:
                    aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: false
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - iam:*
                  - ec2:*
                  - s3:Get*
                  - s3:List*
                  - s3:Put*
                  - s3:Delete*
                  - s3:CreateBucket
                  - s3:DeleteBucket
                  - lambda:*
                  - rds:*
                  - cloudformation:*
                Resource: '*'

  RestrictedAdminGroup:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Group
    Properties:
      GroupName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RestrictedAdminGroup'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RestrictedAdminGroupPolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - billing:*
                  - cloudhsm:*
                  - iam:*
                Resource: '*'
              - Sid: DenyElevatedWithoutMFA
                Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - ec2:RunInstances
                  - ec2:TerminateInstances
                  - ec2:StartInstances
                  - ec2:StopInstances
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:DeleteObject
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  Bool:
                    aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: false
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ec2:Describe*
                  - ec2:List*
                  - s3:Get*
                  - s3:List*
                  - cloudformation:*
                Resource: '*'

  IdentityAdminGroup:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Group
    Properties:
      GroupName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IdentityAdminGroup'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IdentityAdminGroupPolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - billing:*
                  - cloudhsm:*
                Resource: '*'
              - Sid: DenyElevatedWithoutMFA
                Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - iam:DeleteRolePolicy
                  - iam:DeleteRole
                  - iam:DeleteUser
                  - iam:DeleteAccessKey
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  Bool:
                    aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: false
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - iam:*
                Resource: '*'

  CloudFormationExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-CloudFormationExecution'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: cloudformation.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-CloudFormationExecutionPolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - cloudformation:ValidateTemplate
                  - cloudformation:CreateStack
                  - cloudformation:UpdateStack
                  - cloudformation:DeleteStack
                  - cloudformation:DescribeStacks
                  - cloudformation:EstimateTemplateCost
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:cloudformation:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:stack/*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  StackSetExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-StackSetExecution'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: cloudformation.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-StackSetExecutionPolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - cloudformation:CreateStackSet
                  - cloudformation:UpdateStackSet
                  - cloudformation:DeleteStackSet
                  - cloudformation:DescribeStackSet*
                  - cloudformation:CreateStackInstances
                  - cloudformation:UpdateStackInstances
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - billing:*
                  - cloudhsm:*
                  - iam:PassRole
                  - sts:AssumeRole
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Parameters:
  ExistingVpcId:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    AllowedPattern: '^$|^vpc-[0-9a-f]{8,17}$'
    Description: 'Existing VPC ID to enable flow logging on'
  TrafficType:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - ALL
      - ACCEPT
      - REJECT
    Default: ALL
  LogPrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z0-9\-./]*$'
Conditions:
  UseExistingVpc: !Not [!Equals [!Ref ExistingVpcId, '']]
Resources:
  FlowLogsKmsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key for VPC Flow Logs S3 bucket encryption'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              ArnLike:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:aws:ec2:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:vpc-flow-log/*'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
  FlowLogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-vpc-flow-logs-${AWS::StackName}'
      OwnershipControls:
        Rules:
          - ObjectOwnership: BucketOwnerEnforced
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - BucketKeyEnabled: true
            ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref FlowLogsKmsKey
  FlowLogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref FlowLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action: s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub '${FlowLogsBucket.Arn}/AWSLogs/${AWS::AccountId}/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                's3:x-amz-acl': bucket-owner-full-control
              ArnLike:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:aws:ec2:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:vpc-flow-log/*'
          - Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: s3:PutObject*
            Resource: !Sub '${FlowLogsBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              StringNotLike:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:aws:ec2:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:vpc-flow-log/*'
          - Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: s3:*
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt FlowLogsBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${FlowLogsBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
  VpcFlowLog:
    Type: AWS::EC2::FlowLog
    Condition: UseExistingVpc
    Properties:
      ResourceId: !Ref ExistingVpcId
      ResourceType: VPC
      TrafficType: !Ref TrafficType
      LogDestinationType: s3
      LogDestination: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${FlowLogsBucket}${LogPrefix}'
      MaxAggregationInterval: 60
      LogFormat: 'version,account-id,interface-id,srcaddr,dstaddr,srcport,dstport,protocol,packets,bytes,window-start,end,start,action,flowlog-status,vpc-id,subnet-id,instance-id,src-vpc-id,dst-vpc-id,traffic-type'
Outputs:
  FlowLogsBucketName:
    Description: S3 bucket for VPC flow logs
    Value: !Ref FlowLogsBucket
  VpcId:

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Parameters:
  VpcCidrBlock:
    Type: String
    Default: '10.0.0.0/16'
    Description: VPC CIDR block in CIDR notation.
  LogPrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: "Optional prefix for S3 bucket name to support organizational structuring of flow log storage"
Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidrBlock
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: VPCFlowLogs
  FlowLogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${LogPrefix}${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-vpc-flow-logs-${AWS::StackName}'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref FlowLogsKey
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      OwnershipControls:
        Rules:
          - ObjectOwnership: BucketOwnerEnforced
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: VPCFlowLogs
  FlowLogsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub 'KMS key for VPC Flow Logs (${AWS::StackName})'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Enable IAM User Permissions'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow VPC Flow Logs service'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: VPCFlowLogs
  FlowLogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref FlowLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${FlowLogsBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action: s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${FlowLogsBucket}/AWSLogs/${AWS::AccountId}/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                's3:x-amz-acl': 'bucket-owner-full-control'
Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: "S3 bucket name for VPC flow logs, usable in downstream systems"
    Value: !Ref FlowLogsBucket

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: |-
  CloudFormation template for a risk management system for AWS workloads. Provisions a DynamoDB table for storing workload and risk data, two Lambda functions for ingestion and analysis, an IAM role with DynamoDB permissions, and an SNS topic with policy for SSM OpsCenter notifications.

Resources:
  RiskTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RiskTable'
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: workload_id
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: question_id
          AttributeType: S
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: workload_id
          KeyType: HASH
        - AttributeName: question_id
          KeyType: RANGE
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
        SSEType: KMS
        KMSMasterKeyId: alias/aws/dynamodb
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'
        - Key: Project
          Value: RiskManagement

  LambdaRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LambdaRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DynamoDBAccessPolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - dynamodb:PutItem
                  - dynamodb:UpdateItem
                  - dynamodb:GetItem
                  - dynamodb:DeleteItem
                  - dynamodb:Query
                  - dynamodb:Scan
                  - dynamodb:DescribeTable
                Resource: !GetAtt RiskTable.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'
        - Key: Project
          Value: RiskManagement

  RiskIngesterLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RiskIngesterLambda'
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      MemorySize: 128

              table.put_item(
                  Item={
                      'workload_id': event.get('workload_id

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Resources:
  CrossServiceAutomationRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-CrossServiceAutomationRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - ssm.amazonaws.com
                - lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: CrossServiceAutomationPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssm:SendCommand
                  - ssm:CancelCommand
                  - ssm:GetCommandInvocation
                  - ssm:ListCommands
                  - ssm:StartSession
                  - ssm:TerminateSession
                  - ssm:StartAutomationExecution
                  - ssm:StopAutomationExecution
                  - ssm:GetAutomationExecution
                  - ssm:SendAutomationSignal
                  - ssm:GetParameter
                  - ssm:GetParameters
                  - ssm:DescribeParameters
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ec2:DescribeInstances
                  - ec2:DescribeInstanceStatus
                  - ec2:RebootInstances
                  - ec2:StartInstances
                  - ec2:StopInstances
                  - ec2:TerminateInstances
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - cloudwatch:PutMetricData
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                  - logs:DescribeLogGroups
                  - logs:DescribeLogStreams
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-CrossServiceAutomationRole'
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: 'Centralized role for SSM EC2 and monitoring automation'
Outputs:
  CrossServiceAutomationRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the cross-service automation role'
    Value: !GetAtt CrossServiceAutomationRole.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates an S3 bucket with KMS server-side encryption, versioning, public access blocks, and event notifications to a KMS-encrypted SNS topic for s3:ObjectCreated:* events. Includes SNS topic policy allowing S3 service to publish from this specific bucket only, and KMS key policy granting access to S3 and SNS services restricted to this bucket and topic.'

Resources:
  NotificationKmsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key used for S3 bucket SSE-KMS and SNS topic SSE-KMS'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Enable IAM User Permissions'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow S3 and SNS Services'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - s3.amazonaws.com
                - sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              ArnLike:
                aws:SourceArn:
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-bucket'
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:sns:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-topic'

  SNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-topic'
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref NotificationKmsKey

  SNSTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref SNSTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowS3Publish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !GetAtt SNSTopic.TopicArn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-bucket'

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DependsOn: SNSTopicPolicy
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-bucket'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref NotificationKmsKey
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      NotificationConfiguration:
        TopicConfigurations:
          - Event: s3:ObjectCreated:*
            Topic: !GetAtt SNSTopic.TopicArn

Outputs:
  S3BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-S3BucketName'

  SNSTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the SNS topic for S3 event notifications
    Value: !GetAtt SNSTopic.TopicArn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SNSTopicArn'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template provisioning an API Gateway REST API integrated with SQS queue to enable HTTP-based message retrieval via GET /messages, forwarding query parameters to SQS ReceiveMessage.

Resources:
  SQSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub "CMK for ${AWS::StackName}Queue-${AWS::Region} encryption"
      Enabled: true
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: "*"
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: "sqs.amazonaws.com"
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: "*"
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                kms:ViaService: !Sub "sqs.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com"
              ArnEquals:
                sqs:QueueArn: !Sub "arn:aws:sqs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${AWS::StackName}Queue-${AWS::Region}"

  Queue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}Queue-${AWS::Region}"
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SQSKey

  QueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref Queue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: "apigateway.amazonaws.com"
            Action: sqs:ReceiveMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt Queue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !Sub "arn:aws:execute-api:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${RestApi}/*/*/*"

  ApiGatewayRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ApiGatewayRole-${AWS::Region}"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: apigateway.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-SQSAccess-${AWS::Region}"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sqs:ReceiveMessage
                Resource: !GetAtt Queue.Arn

  RestApi:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-Api-${AWS::Region}"
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - REGIONAL
      BinaryMediaTypes: []

  MessagesResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ParentId: !GetAtt RestApi.RootResourceId
      PathPart: messages

  GetMessagesMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ResourceId: !Ref MessagesResource
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub "arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:sqs:action/ReceiveMessage"
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayRole.Arn
        PassthroughBehavior: WHEN_NO_MATCH
        RequestTemplates:
          application/x-www-form-urlencoded: !Sub |
            #set($inputRoot = $input.params())
            Action=ReceiveMessage&QueueUrl=${Queue}&Version=2012-10-17
            #if($inputRoot.get('MaxNumberOfMessages'))&MaxNumberOfMessages=$inputRoot.get('MaxNumberOfMessages')#end
            #if($inputRoot.get('WaitTimeSeconds'))&WaitTimeSeconds=$inputRoot.get('WaitTimeSeconds')#end
            #if($inputRoot.get('VisibilityTimeout'))&VisibilityTimeout=$inputRoot.get('VisibilityTimeout')#end
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: '200'
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: |
                {
                  "Messages": $util.toJson($input.path('$.ReceiveMessageResponse.ReceiveMessageResult.Message'))
                }

  Deployment:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment
    DependsOn: GetMessagesMethod
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi

  ProdStage:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Stage
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      DeploymentId: !Ref Deployment
      StageName: prod

Outputs:
  ApiEndpoint:
    Description: "GET endpoint to poll SQS messages (supports query params: MaxNumberOfMessages, WaitTimeSeconds, VisibilityTimeout)"
    Value: !Sub "https://${RestApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/prod/messages"
  QueueUrl:
    Description: SQS Queue URL
    Value: !Ref Queue
  ApiGatewayRoleArn:
    Description: IAM Role ARN for API Gateway to access SQS
    Value: !GetAtt ApiGatewayRole.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Secure AWS Cognito User Pool with admin-managed provisioning, hosted UI, and web/server clients.

Parameters:
  DomainPrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: 'cfn-iter9-unique-auth'
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-z0-9]([a-z0-9-]{0,61}[a-z0-9])?$'
    ConstraintDescription: Must be 1-63 characters long, contain only lowercase letters (a-z), numbers (0-9), and hyphens (-). Must not start or end with a hyphen.
    Description: Unique prefix for the Cognito hosted UI domain (e.g., myapp -> myapp.auth.region.amazoncognito.com). Must be globally unique.
  CallbackURLs:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Default: 'https://localhost:3000/callback'
    Description: Comma-separated list of callback URLs for OAuth authorization code flow.
  LogoutURLs:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Default: 'https://localhost:3000/logout'
    Description: Comma-separated list of logout URLs for OAuth sign-out.

Resources:
  UserPool:
    Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPool
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      UserPoolName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-UserPool'
      UsernameAttributes:
        - email
      AutoVerifiedAttributes:
        - email
      AdminCreateUserConfig:
        AllowAdminCreateUserOnly: true
        UnusedAccountValidityDays: 7
        InviteMessageTemplate:
          EmailMessage: "Your username is {username} and temporary password is {####}."
          EmailSubject: !Sub '${AWS::StackName} - Temporary Password'
          SMSMessage: "Your username is {username} and temporary password is {####}."
      Policies:
        PasswordPolicy:
          MinimumLength: 8
          RequireUppercase: true
          RequireLowercase: true
          RequireNumbers: true
          RequireSymbols: true
      UserPoolTags:
        Key: Name
        Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  UserPoolDomain:
    Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPoolDomain
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Domain: !Ref DomainPrefix
      UserPoolId: !Ref UserPool

  WebClient:
    Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPoolClient
    Properties:
      ClientName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-WebClient'
      UserPoolId: !Ref UserPool
      ExplicitAuthFlows:
        - ALLOW_USER_PASSWORD_AUTH
        - ALLOW_REFRESH_TOKEN_AUTH
        - ALLOW_USER_SRP_AUTH
      GenerateSecret: false
      AllowedOAuthFlowsUserPoolClient: true
      CallbackURLs: !Ref CallbackURLs
      LogoutURLs: !Ref LogoutURLs
      AllowedOAuthFlows:
        - code
      AllowedOAuthScopes:
        - email
        - openid
        - phone
        - profile

  ServerClient:
    Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPoolClient
    Properties:
      ClientName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ServerClient'
      UserPoolId: !Ref UserPool
      ExplicitAuthFlows:
        - ALLOW_USER_PASSWORD_AUTH
        - ALLOW_REFRESH_TOKEN_AUTH
        - ALLOW_USER_SRP_AUTH
      GenerateSecret: true
      AllowedOAuthFlowsUserPoolClient: true
      CallbackURLs: !Ref CallbackURLs
      LogoutURLs: !Ref LogoutURLs
      AllowedOAuthFlows:
        - code
      AllowedOAuthScopes:
        - email
        - openid
        - phone
        - profile

Outputs:
  UserPoolId:
    Description: Cognito User Pool ID
    Value: !Ref UserPool
  UserPoolDomain:
    Description: Cognito User Pool Domain Prefix
    Value: !Ref UserPoolDomain
  WebClientId:
    Description: Web App Client ID
    Value: !Ref WebClient
  ServerClientId:
    Description: Server App Client ID
    Value: !Ref ServerClient
  ServerClientSecret:
    Description: Server App Client Secret
    Value: !GetAtt ServerClient.ClientSecret

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Event-driven EventBridge-to-MongoDB API integration with fault-tolerant dead-letter SQS queue handling.'

Parameters:
  MongoDBURL:
    Type: String
    Default: 'https://www.testanu.com'
  ApiKeyName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'test_name'
  ApiKeyValue:
    Type: String
    NoEcho: true
    Default: 'test_value'

Resources:
  MongoDBApiKeySecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-mongodb-apikey'
      SecretString: !Ref ApiKeyValue

  DLQKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub 'CMK for ${AWS::StackName} DLQ encryption'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow EventBridge
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'

  DLQ:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-dlq'
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref DLQKey

  EventBus:
    Type: AWS::Events::EventBus
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-eventbus'

  DLQQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    DependsOn: DLQKey
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref DLQ
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt DLQ.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !GetAtt EventBus.Arn

  EventBridgeRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SendToDLQ'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sqs:SendMessage
                Resource: !GetAtt DLQ.Arn

  Connection:
    Type: AWS::Events::Connection
    Properties:
      AuthorizationType: API_KEY
      AuthParameters:
        ApiKeyAuthParameters:
          ApiKeyName: !Ref ApiKeyName
          ApiKeyValue: !Ref ApiKeyValue
      Description: !Sub 'Connection for ${AWS::StackName} MongoDB API'

  ApiDestination:
    Type: AWS::Events::ApiDestination
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-apidestination'
      ConnectionArn: !GetAtt Connection.Arn
      InvocationEndpoint: !Ref MongoDBURL
      HttpMethod: POST
      InvocationRateLimitPerSecond: 10

  MongoDBRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      EventBusName: !Ref EventBus
      State: ENABLED
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - prefix: 'app'
      Targets:
        - Id: MongoDBTarget
          Arn: !GetAtt ApiDestination.Arn
          RoleArn: !GetAtt EventBridgeRole.Arn

Outputs:
  EventBusArn:
    Description: ARN of the custom EventBridge EventBus
    Value: !GetAtt EventBus.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EventBusArn'
  ConnectionArn:
    Description: ARN of the EventBridge Connection
    Value: !GetAtt Connection.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ConnectionArn'
  ApiDestinationArn:
    Description: ARN of the EventBridge ApiDestination
    Value: !GetAtt ApiDestination.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ApiDestinationArn'
  RuleArn:
    Description: ARN of the EventBridge Rule
    Value: !GetAtt MongoDBRule.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RuleArn'
  DLQUrl:
    Description: URL of the Dead-Letter SQS Queue
    Value: !Ref DLQ
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DLQUrl'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'EventBridge integration with DataDog for centralized log forwarding'

Parameters:
  DataDogAPIKey:
    Type: String
    NoEcho: true
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z0-9]{7,32}$'
    Default: 'testanu'
    ConstraintDescription: 'DataDog API key must be 7-32 alphanumeric characters.'

Resources:
  DataDogApiKeySecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DataDogAPIKey'
      SecretString: !Ref DataDogAPIKey
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain

  DataDogEventBus:
    Type: AWS::Events::EventBus
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EventBus'

  DataDogDLQKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'CMK for DataDog DLQ encryption'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Allow root'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow SQS'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 'sqs.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'

  DataDogDLQ:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DLQ'
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref DataDogDLQKey
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain

  DataDogDLQPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref DataDogDLQ
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt DataDogDLQ.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !Sub '${DataDogRule.Arn}'

  DataDogEventBridgeRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DataDogEventBridgePolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: secretsmanager:GetSecretValue
                Resource: !Ref DataDogApiKeySecret

  DataDogConnection:
    Type: AWS::Events::Connection
    Properties:
      AuthorizationType: API_KEY
      AuthParameters:
        ApiKeyAuthParameters:
          ApiKeyName: 'DD-API-KEY'
          ApiKeyValue: !Ref DataDogAPIKey

  DataDogApiDestination:
    Type: AWS::Events::ApiDestination
    Properties:
      ConnectionArn: !GetAtt DataDogConnection.Arn
      InvocationEndpoint: 'https://http-intake.logs.datadoghq.com/api/v2/logs'
      HttpMethod: POST
      InvocationRateLimitPerSecond: 1000

  DataDogRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      EventBusName: !Ref DataDogEventBus
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - MyDataDogApp
      State: ENABLED
      Targets:
        - Id: 'DataDogTarget'
          Arn: !Ref DataDogApiDestination
          RoleArn: !GetAtt DataDogEventBridgeRole.Arn

Outputs:
  DataDogEventBusName:
    Description: 'Name of the DataDog EventBus'
    Value: !GetAtt DataDogEventBus.Name
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DataDogEventBusName'

  DataDogEventBusArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the DataDog EventBus'
    Value: !Ref DataDogEventBus
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DataDogEventBusArn'

  DataDogApiKeySecretArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the DataDog API Key Secret'
    Value: !Ref DataDogApiKeySecret
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DataDogApiKeySecretArn'

  DataDogDLQName:
    Description: 'Name of the DataDog DLQ'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template provisioning an S3 bucket with server-side encryption, versioning, public access blocks, and configured to send s3:ObjectCreated:* event notifications to an SQS queue for event-driven object upload processing.'

Resources:
  SQSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub 'CMK for ${AWS::StackName} SQS queue encryption'
      KeyUsage: ENCRYPT_DECRYPT
      KeySpec: SYMMETRIC_DEFAULT
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Allow root
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow SQS
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sqs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow S3
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
            Resource: '*'

  SQSQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-queue-${AWS::Region}'
      VisibilityTimeout: 300
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SQSKey

  QueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action: sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt SQSQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${AWS::StackName}-bucket-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      Queues:
        - !Ref SQSQueue

  Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-bucket-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      OwnershipControls:
        Rules:
          - ObjectOwnership: BucketOwnerEnforced
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: aws/s3
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      NotificationConfiguration:
        QueueConfigurations:
          - Event: s3:ObjectCreated:*
            Queue: !GetAtt SQSQueue.Arn

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref Bucket
  QueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the SQS queue
    Value: !Ref SQSQueue
  QueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the SQS queue
    Value: !GetAtt SQSQueue.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: This template creates an Amazon EventBridge rule that forwards events from the 'demo.cli' source to an Amazon SNS topic, including necessary permissions.

Resources:
  SNSTopicKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SNS-encryption-key'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: "Allow root access"
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: "*"
          - Sid: "Allow SNS service"
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
            Resource: "*"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  SNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-topic'
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SNSTopicKMSKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  EventBridgeRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-rule'
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - demo.cli
      Targets:
        - Id: SNSTarget
          Arn: !Ref SNSTopic
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  SNSTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref SNSTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowEventBridge
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref SNSTopic
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !Ref EventBridgeRule

Outputs:
  SNSTopicArn:
    Value: !Ref SNSTopic
  EventBridgeRuleArn:
    Value: !GetAtt EventBridgeRule.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: "Deploys B2BI pipeline for EDI X12_214 to JSON transformation with secure S3 input/output buckets."

Resources:
  B2BIDatainterchangeKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Description: "KMS key for B2BI S3 encryption"
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: "Enable IAM User Permissions"
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: "kms:*"
            Resource: "*"
          - Sid: "Allow S3 service"
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: "s3.amazonaws.com"
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: "*"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  InputBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-input-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}"
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !GetAtt B2BIDatainterchangeKey.Arn
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      OwnershipControls:
        Rules:
          - ObjectOwnership: "BucketOwnerEnforced"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  InputBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref InputBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'ForceSSL'
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${InputBucket}"
              - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${InputBucket}/*"
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  OutputBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-output-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}"
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !GetAtt B2BIDatainterchangeKey.Arn
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      OwnershipControls:
        Rules:
          - ObjectOwnership: "BucketOwnerEnforced"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  OutputBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref OutputBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'ForceSSL'
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${OutputBucket}"
              - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${OutputBucket}/*"
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  Profile:
    Type: AWS::B2BI::Profile
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-profile"
      BusinessName: "Business Contact"
      Phone: "+1-555-0123"
      Email: "contact@example.com"
      Logging: "ENABLED"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  Transformer:
    Type: AWS::B2BI::Transformer
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-x12-transformer"
      Status: "active"
      InputConversion:
        FromFormat: "X12"
        FormatOptions:
          X12:
            Version: "VERSION_4010"
            TransactionSet: "X12_214"
      Mapping:
        TemplateLanguage: "JSONATA"
        Template: >-
          {
            "shipmentStatus": {
              "transactionSet": "$ST01",
              "controlNumber": "$ST02"
            },
            "carrierInfo": {
              "beginAck": "$BAK02",
              "name": "$N101",
              "id": "$N104"
            },
            "lineItems": [
              {
                "sequence": "$LX01",
                "qty": "$L302",
                "weight": "$L304",
                "location": "$L0101"
              }
            ]
          }
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

Outputs:
  InputBucketName:
    Value: !Ref InputBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-InputBucket"
  OutputBucketName:
    Value: !Ref OutputBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-OutputBucket"
  ProfileId:
    Value: !Ref Profile
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ProfileId"
  TransformerId:
    Value: !Ref Transformer
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-TransformerId"
  KmsKeyId:
    Value: !Ref B2BIDatainterchangeKey
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-KmsKeyId"
