final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: IAM Developer Role with configurable permission boundaries and governance controls

Parameters:
  EnableStrictEnforcement:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - 'true'
      - 'false'
    Default: 'false'
    Description: Toggle for strict permission boundary enforcement
  TeamPrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: MyTeam
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9-]*'
    Description: Prefix for team-managed IAM resources
  OwnerTagValue:
    Type: String
    Default: 'dev-team'
    Description: Value for the mandatory Owner tag

Conditions:
  StrictEnabled: !Equals [!Ref EnableStrictEnforcement, 'true']

Resources:
  DefaultPermissionBoundary:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${TeamPrefix}-DefaultBoundary'
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:*
            Resource: '*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - iam:Get*
              - iam:List*
            Resource: '*'

  PermissiveIAMPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${TeamPrefix}-PermissivePolicy'
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action: iam:*
            Resource: '*'

  RestrictedIAMPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${TeamPrefix}-RestrictedPolicy'
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - iam:Get*
              - iam:List*
            Resource: '*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action: iam:CreateRole
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringLike:
                'iam:RoleName': !Sub '${TeamPrefix}*'
              StringEquals:
                'iam:PermissionsBoundary': !GetAtt [DefaultPermissionBoundary, PolicyArn]
                'iam:RequestTag/Owner': !Ref OwnerTagValue
          - Effect: Allow
            Action: iam:CreatePolicy
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringLike:
                'iam:PolicyName': !Sub '${TeamPrefix}*'
              StringEquals:
                'iam:RequestTag/Owner': !Ref OwnerTagValue
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - iam:UpdateRole
              - iam:DeleteRole
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringLike:
                'iam:RoleName': !Sub '${TeamPrefix}*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - iam:AttachRolePolicy
              - iam:PutRolePolicy
              - iam:DeleteRolePolicy
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringLike:
                'iam:RoleName': !Sub '${TeamPrefix}*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - iam:TagRole
              - iam:UntagRole
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'iam:TagKeys': ['Owner']
                'iam:RequestTag/Owner': !Ref OwnerTagValue

  DeveloperRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${TeamPrefix}-DeveloperRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringLike:
                'aws:PrincipalARN': !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:user/*'
      MaxSessionDuration: 3600
      ManagedPolicyArns: !If [StrictEnabled, [!Ref RestrictedIAMPolicy], [!Ref PermissiveIAMPolicy]]
      Tags:
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref OwnerTagValue
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${TeamPrefix}-DeveloperRole'

Outputs:
  DeveloperRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the Developer Role
    Value: !GetAtt DeveloperRole.Arn
  DefaultPermissionBoundaryArn:
    Description: ARN of the Default Permission Boundary Policy
    Value: !GetAtt [DefaultPermissionBoundary, PolicyArn]
  StrictEnforcementStatus:
    Description: Status of strict enforcement
    Value: !If [StrictEnabled, 'Enabled (Restricted Policy)', 'Disabled (Permissive Policy)']

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: "Custom Lambda-backed resource for arithmetic operations with failure simulation"

Parameters:
  FirstNumber:
    Type: Number
    Default: 5
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 1000
  SecondNumber:
    Type: Number
    Default: 3
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 1000
  Operator:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues: ['+', '-', '*', '/']
    Default: '+'
  FailOnPurpose:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues: ['true', 'false']
    Default: 'false'

Resources:
  LambdaRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LambdaRole"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LambdaRole"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Demo

  LambdaFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-MathHelper"
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import urllib.request
          import urllib.error
          import traceback

          def send_response(event, context, success, response_data=None, physical_resource_id=None, reason=None):
              response_url = event['ResponseURL']
              response_body = {
                  'Status': 'SUCCESS' if success else 'FAILED',
                  'Reason': reason or ('See the details in CloudWatch Log Stream: ' + context.log_stream_name),
                  'PhysicalResourceId': physical_resource_id or event.get('PhysicalResourceId', 'default'),
                  'StackId': event['StackId'],
                  'RequestId': event['RequestId'],
                  'LogicalResourceId': event['LogicalResourceId'],
                  'NoEcho': True,
                  'Data': response_data or {}
              }
              json_body = json.dumps(response_body)
              print('Response URL: ' + response_url)
              print('Response body:')
              print(json_body)
              headers = {
                  'content-type': '',
                  'content-length': str(len(json_body))
              }
              req = urllib.request.Request(response_url, data=json_body.encode('utf-8'), method='PUT')
              for header in headers:
                  req.add_header(header, headers[header])
              try:
                  with urllib.request.urlopen(req) as response:
                      print('Response status: %s' % response.getcode())
                      print('Response body: %s' % response.read())
                  print('Successfully sent response')
                  return
              except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
                  print('HTTPError: %s' % e)
                  print(e.read())
              except Exception as e:
                  print('Exception: %s' % e)
                  raise e

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              print('Received event:')
              print(json.dumps(event))
              try:
                  request_type = event['RequestType']
                  props = event['ResourceProperties']
                  first_num = int(props['FirstNumber'])
                  second_num = int(props['SecondNumber'])
                  operator = props['Operator']
                  fail_on_purpose = props['FailOnPurpose']
                  phys_id = f"{first_num}-{second_num}-{operator}"
                  if request_type == 'Delete':
                      send_response(event, context, True, physical_resource_id=phys_id)
                      return
                  if fail_on_purpose == 'true' and request_type == 'Create':
                      send_response(event, context, False, reason='Simulated failure for testing', physical_resource_id=phys_id)
                      return
                  if operator == '+':
                      result = first_num + second_num
                  elif operator == '-':
                      result = first_num - second_num
                  elif operator == '*':
                      result = first_num * second_num
                  elif operator == '/':
                      if second_num == 0:
                          send_response(event, context, False, reason='Division by zero', physical_resource_id=phys_id)
                          return
                      result = first_num / second_num
                  else:
                      send_response(event, context, False, reason=f'Invalid operator: {operator}', physical_resource_id=phys_id)
                      return
                  send_response(event, context, True, {'Result': str(result)}, phys_id)
              except Exception as e:
                  print('Exception:')
                  print(traceback.format_exc())
                  send_response(event, context, False, reason=str(e))
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-MathHelper"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Demo

  CustomHelper:
    Type: AWS::CloudFormation::CustomResource
    Properties:
      ServiceToken: !GetAtt LambdaFunction.Arn
      FirstNumber: !Ref FirstNumber
      SecondNumber: !Ref SecondNumber
      Operator: !Ref Operator
      FailOnPurpose: !Ref FailOnPurpose

Outputs:
  CalculationResult:
    Description: The result of the arithmetic calculation
    Value: !GetAtt CustomHelper.Result
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda function used by the custom resource
    Value: !GetAtt LambdaFunction.Arn
  CustomResourceId:
    Description: Physical resource ID of the custom resource
    Value: !Ref CustomHelper

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Serverless Calculator Workflow using Step Functions and Lambda

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole

  CalculatorLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub '/aws/lambda/${Calculator}'
      RetentionInDays: 3

  Calculator:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: Calculator
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.handler
      Timeout: 30
      MemorySize: 128
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json

          def handler(event, context):
              operator = event.get('operator')
              operands = event.get('operands', [])
              if not operator or not isinstance(operands, list) or len(operands) != 2:
                  raise ValueError('Invalid input: operator and two operands required')
              try:
                  a, b = map(float, operands)
              except (ValueError, TypeError):
                  raise ValueError('Invalid operands: must be two numbers')
              if operator == 'add':
                  result = a + b
              elif operator == 'subtract':
                  result = a - b
              elif operator == 'multiply':
                  result = a * b
              elif operator == 'divide':
                  if b == 0:
                      raise ValueError('Division by zero')
                  result = a / b
              else:
                  raise ValueError('Invalid operator')
              return {'result': result}

  StepFunctionsExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: states.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: StepFunctionsExecutionPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - lambda:InvokeFunction
                Resource: !GetAtt Calculator.Arn

  CalculatorStateMachine:
    Type: AWS::StepFunctions::StateMachine
    Properties:
      StateMachineName: Calculator-StateMachine
      StateMachineType: STANDARD
      RoleArn: !GetAtt StepFunctionsExecutionRole.Arn
      DefinitionString: !Sub |
        {
          "StartAt": "ValidateOperator",
          "States": {
            "ValidateOperator": {
              "Type": "Choice",
              "Choices": [
                {
                  "Variable": "$.operator",
                  "StringEquals": "add",
                  "Next": "Calculate"
                },
                {
                  "Variable": "$.operator",
                  "StringEquals": "subtract",
                  "Next": "Calculate"
                },
                {
                  "Variable": "$.operator",
                  "StringEquals": "multiply",
                  "Next": "Calculate"
                },
                {
                  "Variable": "$.operator",
                  "StringEquals": "divide",
                  "Next": "Calculate"
                }
              ],
              "Default": "FailState"
            },
            "Calculate": {
              "Type": "Task",
              "Resource": "${Calculator.Arn}",
              "ResultPath": "$.result",
              "Next": "SuccessState"
            },
            "SuccessState": {
              "Type": "Succeed"
            },
            "FailState": {
              "Type": "Fail",
              "Cause": "Unsupported operator"
            }
          }
        }

Outputs:
  StateMachineArn:
    Description: ARN of the Calculator State Machine
    Value: !Ref CalculatorStateMachine
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-StateMachineArn'
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: ARN of the Calculator Lambda Function
    Value: !Ref Calculator
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LambdaFunctionArn'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for SSM-managed EC2 Auto Scaling Groups (Linux and Windows) in a public VPC.

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-VPC
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-IGW
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet1
        - Key: Tier
          Value: Public
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet2
        - Key: Tier
          Value: Public
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for SSM-managed EC2 instances allowing HTTP inbound and HTTPS outbound
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-InstanceSG
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
  SSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: SSMRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref SSMRole
  LinuxLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2}}'
        InstanceType: t3.micro
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Name: !Ref InstanceProfile
        BlockDeviceMappings:
          - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
            Ebs:
              VolumeType: gp3
              VolumeSize: 20
              DeleteOnTermination: true
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64:
            Fn::Sub: |
              #!/bin/bash -ex
              curl -o amazon-ssm-agent.rpm https://s3.amazonaws.com/ec2-downloads-windows/SSMAgent/latest/linux_amd64/amazon-ssm-agent.rpm
              sudo yum install -y ./amazon-ssm-agent.rpm
              sudo systemctl daemon-reload
              sudo systemctl enable amazon-ssm-agent
              sudo systemctl start amazon-ssm-agent
              rm -f amazon-ssm-agent.rpm
              /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e $? --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource LinuxAutoScalingGroup --region ${AWS::Region}
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: 0
            AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
            Groups:
              - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
          HttpTokens: required
      TagSpecifications:
        - ResourceType: launch-template
          Tags:
            - Key: Name
              Value: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-LinuxLaunchTemplate
            - Key: Environment
              Value: Production
  WindowsLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-windows-latest/Windows_Server-2019-English-Full-Base}}'
        InstanceType: t3.micro
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Name: !Ref InstanceProfile
        BlockDeviceMappings:
          - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
            Ebs:
              VolumeType: gp3
              VolumeSize: 30
              DeleteOnTermination: true
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64: ''
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: 0
            AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
            Groups:
              - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
          HttpTokens: required
      TagSpecifications:
        - ResourceType: launch-template
          Tags:
            - Key: Name
              Value: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-WindowsLaunchTemplate
            - Key: Environment
              Value: Production
  LinuxAutoScalingGroup:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref LinuxLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt LinuxLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      MinSize: '1'
      MaxSize: '2'
      DesiredCapacity: '1'
      VPCZoneIdentifier:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      HealthCheckType: EC2
      HealthCheckGracePeriod: 300
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-LinuxAutoScalingGroup
          PropagateAtLaunch: true
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
          PropagateAtLaunch: true
  WindowsAutoScalingGroup:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref WindowsLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt WindowsLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      MinSize: '1'
      MaxSize: '2'
      DesiredCapacity: '1'
      VPCZoneIdentifier:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      HealthCheckType: EC2
      HealthCheckGracePeriod: 300
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-WindowsAutoScalingGroup
          PropagateAtLaunch: true
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
          PropagateAtLaunch: true

Outputs:
  LinuxAutoScalingGroup:
    Description: ARN of the Linux Auto Scaling Group for EC2 instances managed by SSM (accessible via Session Manager)
    Value: !GetAtt LinuxAutoScalingGroup.AutoScalingGroupARN
  WindowsAutoScalingGroup:
    Description: ARN of the Windows Auto Scaling Group for EC2 instances managed by SSM (accessible via Session Manager)
    Value: !GetAtt WindowsAutoScalingGroup.AutoScalingGroupARN
  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Description: ID of the Security Group for SSM-managed instances (allows HTTP access and SSM communication)
    Value: !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
  VPC:
    Description: ID of the VPC hosting SSM-managed EC2 instances (public subnets for Session Manager access)
    Value: !Ref VPC
  PublicSubnets:
    Description: Comma-separated list of public subnet IDs for SSM-managed EC2 instances (Session Manager accessible)
    Value: !Join [', ', [!Ref PublicSubnet1, !Ref PublicSubnet2]]

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Multi-tier AWS network with public/private subnets, NAT, and SSM-managed EC2 instances

Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    us-east-1:
      AmazonLinux2023: ami-0c02fb55956c7d316
    us-east-2:
      AmazonLinux2023: ami-0d5d9d301c853a04a
    us-west-1:
      AmazonLinux2023: ami-0fe8c5b5e26241e58
    us-west-2:
      AmazonLinux2023: ami-0a36eb0d5d8b3f6b6
    eu-west-1:
      AmazonLinux2023: ami-0a0b0c0d0e0f1a2b3c

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-igw'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetA'

  PublicSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetB'

  PrivateSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnetA'

  PrivateSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.4.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnetB'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetARouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnetBRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetB
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  NATGatewayEIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NATGatewayEIP'

  NATGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NATGatewayEIP.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetA

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRouteTable'

  PrivateRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NATGateway

  PrivateSubnetARouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  PrivateSubnetBRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetB
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  PublicSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for public web instances allowing HTTP inbound
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSecurityGroup'

  PrivateSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for private instances allowing HTTPS from public SG
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref PublicSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSecurityGroup'

  InstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InstanceRole'

  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref InstanceRole

  PublicLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AmazonLinux2023]
        InstanceType: t3.micro
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Arn: !GetAtt InstanceProfile.Arn
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
          HttpTokens: required
          HttpPutResponseHopLimit: 1
        BlockDeviceMappings:
          - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
            Ebs:
              Encrypted: true
              VolumeSize: 8
              DeleteOnTermination: true
              VolumeType: gp3
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: 0
            SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetA
            Groups:
              - !Ref PublicSecurityGroup
            AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64: !Sub |
            #!/bin/bash -ex
            yum update -y
            yum install -y httpd php php-fpm
            systemctl enable httpd php-fpm
            systemctl start httpd php-fpm
            echo "<?php phpinfo(); ?>" > /var/www/html/index.php
            chmod 644 /var/www/html/index.php
            /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e $? --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource PublicInstance --region ${AWS::Region}

  PrivateLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AmazonLinux2023]
        InstanceType: t3.micro
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Arn: !GetAtt InstanceProfile.Arn
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
          HttpTokens: required
          HttpPutResponseHopLimit: 1
        BlockDeviceMappings:
          - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
            Ebs:
              Encrypted: true
              VolumeSize: 8
              DeleteOnTermination: true
              VolumeType: gp3
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: 0
            SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetA
            Groups:
              - !Ref PrivateSecurityGroup
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64: !Sub |
            #!/bin/bash -ex
            yum update -y
            /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e $? --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource PrivateInstance --region ${AWS::Region}

  PublicInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT15M
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref PublicLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt PublicLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
            VolumeSize: 8
            DeleteOnTermination: true
            VolumeType: gp3
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicInstance'

  PrivateInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT15M
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref PrivateLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt PrivateLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
            VolumeSize: 8
            DeleteOnTermination: true
            VolumeType: gp3
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateInstance'

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPCId'

  PublicInstanceId:
    Description: Public Instance ID
    Value: !Ref PublicInstance
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicInstanceId'

  PublicInstanceDnsName:
    Description: Public Instance Public DNS Name
    Value: !GetAtt PublicInstance.PublicDnsName
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicInstanceDnsName'

  PrivateInstanceId:
    Description: Private Instance ID
    Value: !Ref PrivateInstance
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateInstanceId'

  PublicSecurityGroupId:
    Description: Public Security Group ID
    Value: !Ref PublicSecurityGroup
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSecurityGroupId'

  PrivateSecurityGroupId:
    Description: Private Security Group ID
    Value: !Ref PrivateSecurityGroup
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSecurityGroupId'

  PublicSubnetAId:
    Description: Public Subnet A ID
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnetA
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetAId'

  PublicSubnetBId:
    Description: Public Subnet B ID
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnetB
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetBId'

  PrivateSubnetAId:
    Description: Private Subnet A ID
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnetA
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnetAId'

  PrivateSubnetBId:
    Description: Private Subnet B ID
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnetB
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnetBId'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Secure S3 static website with CloudFront OAC and automated content management.

Resources:
  StaticWebsiteKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for static website bucket
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable root access
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow S3 service
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
            Resource: '*'

  StaticWebsiteBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Delete
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-static-website-${AWS::StackName}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - BucketKeyEnabled: true
            ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref StaticWebsiteKMSKey
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Jenkins server deployment across multiple Availability Zones using AWS Auto Scaling, with EC2 instances in public subnets, SSM access, and automated installation.'

Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    us-east-1:
      AMI: ami-0c02fb55956c7d316
    us-east-2:
      AMI: ami-0d3f9d7e5c8b9a0c1
    us-west-2:
      AMI: ami-0d5d9d301c853a04a
    us-west-1:
      AMI: ami-0a0e7d6e1c8d5f2b3
    eu-west-1:
      AMI: ami-0a4729d99e76dd1bb
    eu-central-1:
      AMI: ami-0c0bb08e9e97e2e8f

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetA'

  PublicSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetB'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetARouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnetBRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetB
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicNACL:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAcl
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicNACL'

  PublicNACLEphemeralTCPInbound:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNACL
      RuleNumber: 100
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      Egress: false
      Protocol: 6
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535

  PublicNACLEphemeralUDPInbound:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNACL
      RuleNumber: 110
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      Egress: false
      Protocol: 17
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535

  PublicNACLHTTPInbound:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNACL
      RuleNumber: 200
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      Egress: false
      Protocol: 6
      PortRange:
        From: 80
        To: 80

  PublicNACLHTTPSInbound:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNACL
      RuleNumber: 210
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      Egress: false
      Protocol: 6
      PortRange:
        From: 443
        To: 443

  PublicNACLJenkinsInbound:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNACL
      RuleNumber: 220
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      Egress: false
      Protocol: 6
      PortRange:
        From: 8080
        To: 8080

  PublicNACLOutboundTCP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNACL
      RuleNumber: 100
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      Egress: true
      Protocol: 6
      PortRange:
        From: 0
        To: 65535

  PublicNACLOutboundUDP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNACL
      RuleNumber: 110
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      Egress: true
      Protocol: 17
      PortRange:
        From: 0
        To: 65535

  PublicNACLOutboundICMP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNACL
      RuleNumber: 120
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      Egress: true
      Protocol: 1
      Icmp:
        Type: -1
        Code: -1

  PublicSubnetANACLAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetA
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNACL

  PublicSubnetBNACLAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetB
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNACL

  JenkinsSG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Jenkins instances
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 8080
          ToPort: 8080
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-JenkinsSG'

  EC2SSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2SSMRole'

  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2SSMRole

  JenkinsLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-JenkinsLaunchTemplate'
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AMI]
        InstanceType: t3.medium
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Name: !Ref InstanceProfile
        KeyName: !Ref 'AWS::NoValue'
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
          HttpTokens: required
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: 0
            SubnetId: !Ref 'AWS::NoValue'
            Groups:
              - !Ref JenkinsSG
            AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
        TagSpecifications:
          - ResourceType: instance
            Tags:
              - Key: Name
                Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Jenkins'
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64: |
            #!/bin/bash
            dnf update -y
            dnf install -y java-17-amazon-corretto
            rpm --import https://pkg.jenkins.io/redhat-stable/jenkins.io-2023.key
            wget -O /etc/yum.repos.d/jenkins.repo https://pkg.jenkins.io/redhat-stable/jenkins.repo
            dnf install -y jenkins
            mkdir -p /var/log/jenkins
            echo 'JENKINS_OPTS="--httpPort=8080"' >> /etc/sysconfig/jenkins
            systemctl daemon-reload
            systemctl enable jenkins
            systemctl start jenkins
            until systemctl is-active --quiet jenkins; do
              sleep 1
            done
            password=$(cat /var/lib/jenkins/secrets/initialAdminPassword)
            echo "Jenkins initial admin password: $password" >> /var/log/jenkins/jenkins.log

  JenkinsASG:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    Properties:
      AutoScalingGroupName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-JenkinsASG'
      VPCZoneIdentifier:
        - !Ref PublicSubnetA
        - !Ref PublicSubnetB
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref JenkinsLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt JenkinsLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      MinSize: '1'
      MaxSize: '2'
      DesiredCapacity: '1'
      HealthCheckType: EC2
      HealthCheckGracePeriod: 300
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Jenkins'
          PropagateAtLaunch: true

Outputs:
  JenkinsASG:
    Description: Name of the Jenkins Auto Scaling Group
    Value: !Ref JenkinsASG

  LaunchTemplateID:
    Description: ID of the Jenkins Launch Template
    Value: !Ref JenkinsLaunchTemplate

  SecurityGroupID:
    Description: ID of the Jenkins Security Group
    Value: !Ref JenkinsSG

  JenkinsAccessNote:
    Description: Access Jenkins at http://[Instance Public IP]:8080 (find public IP in EC2 console for instances in ASG). Use AWS Systems Manager Session Manager for management (no SSH needed). Initial admin password is logged to /var/log/jenkins/jenkins.log on the instance.
    Value: !Sub 'http://[Instance Public IP from ${JenkinsASG}]:8080. Initial password in /var/log/jenkins/jenkins.log. Use SSM Session Manager.'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-igw'
  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet'
  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-subnet-1'
  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-subnet-2'
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-rt'
  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
  CacheSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::ElastiCache::SubnetGroup
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub 'Cache Subnet Group for ${AWS::StackName}'
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      CacheSubnetGroupName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-cache-subnet-group'
  ElastiCacheSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for ElastiCache Redis cluster
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 6379
          ToPort: 6379
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-elasticache-sg'
  EC2SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for EC2 instance with SSM and ElastiCache access
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ec2-sg'
  EC2InstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2InstanceRole
  LaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2}}'
        InstanceType: t3.micro
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Name: !Ref InstanceProfile
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: 0
            SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
            Groups:
              - !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
            AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64: |
            #!/bin/bash
            yum update -y
            yum install -y redis
        BlockDeviceMappings:
          - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
            Ebs:
              Encrypted: true
              VolumeSize: 8
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpTokens: "required"
          HttpEndpoint: "enabled"
          HttpPutResponseHopLimit: 1
  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref LaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt LaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
            VolumeSize: 8
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ec2'
  RedisReplicationGroup:
    Type: AWS::ElastiCache::ReplicationGroup
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      ReplicationGroupId: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-redis'
      ReplicationGroupDescription: Minimal Redis cache cluster
      Engine: redis
      EngineVersion: 7.1
      CacheNodeType: cache.t3.micro
      NumNodeGroups: 1
      ReplicasPerNodeGroup: 0
      CacheSubnetGroupName: !Ref CacheSubnetGroup
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref ElastiCacheSecurityGroup
      AtRestEncryptionEnabled: true
      TransitEncryptionEnabled: true
Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC
  ElastiCachePrimaryEndpoint:
    Description: Primary endpoint address of the Redis ElastiCache cluster
    Value: !GetAtt RedisReplicationGroup.PrimaryEndPoint.Address
  EC2InstanceId:
    Description: "EC2 Instance ID. Access via SSM Session Manager: aws ssm start-session --target <InstanceId>"
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for Bedrock Agent with Lambda for stock price lookup

Parameters:
  FoundationModelId:
    Type: String
    Default: 'anthropic.claude-3-sonnet-20240229-v1:0'
    AllowedPattern: '^anthropic\.claude-3-sonnet-20240229-v1:0$|^arn:aws:bedrock:.*:.*:foundation-model/.*'
    Description: 'Foundation model ID for the Bedrock Agent (e.g., arn:aws:bedrock:us-east-1::foundation-model/anthropic.claude-3-sonnet-20240229-v1:0)'

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole

  StockPriceLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              symbol = None
              if 'parameters' in event:
                  for param in event['parameters']:
                      if param.get('name') == 'symbol':
                          symbol = param.get('value')
                          break
              response = {
                  "price": 100
              }
              return {
                  "statusCode": 200,
                  "responseBody": {
                      "application/json": json.dumps(response)
                  }
              }

  LambdaInvokePermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref StockPriceLambda
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: bedrock.amazonaws.com
      SourceArn: !GetAtt StockAgent.AgentArn

  AgentServiceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: bedrock.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: BedrockAgentPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: bedrock:InvokeModel
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
                Resource: !GetAtt StockPriceLambda.Arn

  StockAgent:
    Type: AWS::Bedrock::Agent
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      AgentName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-stock-agent'
      FoundationModel: !Ref FoundationModelId
      Instruction: You are a stock price assistant. For stock price queries, invoke the getStockPrice action with the stock symbol as parameter.
      AgentResourceRoleArn: !GetAtt AgentServiceRole.Arn
      ActionGroups:
        - ActionGroupName: StockActions
          ActionGroupExecutor:
            Lambda: !GetAtt StockPriceLambda.Arn
          ApiSchema:
            Payload: '{"openapi":"3.0.0","info":{"title":"Stock Price API","version":"1.0.0"},"paths":{"/getStockPrice":{"post":{"operationId":"getStockPrice","description":"Retrieve current stock price for a symbol","parameters":[],"requestBody":{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"symbol":{"type":"string","description":"Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL)"}},"required":["symbol"]}}}},"responses":{"200":{"description":"Successful response","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"price":{"type":"number","description":"Current stock price"}},"required":["price"]}}}}}}}}'

  StockAgentAlias:
    Type: AWS::Bedrock::AgentAlias
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      AgentId: !Ref StockAgent
      AgentAliasName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-stock-alias'
      RoutingConfiguration:
        - AgentVersion: DRAFT

Outputs:
  StockAgentId:
    Description: ID of the Bedrock Stock Agent for integration reference
    Value: !Ref StockAgent
  StockAgentAliasArn:
    Description: ARN of the Bedrock Agent Alias for runtime invocation
    Value: !Ref StockAgentAlias
  StockPriceLambdaArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda function for stock price lookup
    Value: !GetAtt StockPriceLambda.Arn
